listing_name: Basil Bungalow | Plaza Midwood
description:
Originally built in 1929, this historic home has been carefully updated for modern living while honoring its timeless character. A rocking chair front porch sets the tone — perfect for slow mornings or golden-hour cocktails. The main bath offers a touch of European refinement with a built-in bidet, and off-street parking behind the home adds everyday convenience.

The space
Located in the heart of Plaza Midwood, this restored 1929 bungalow is ten minutes from uptown Charlotte and within walking distance of the neighborhood's beloved restaurants, bars, and boutiques.

The home features original hardwood floors, a tile bath, a large main bedroom, and thoughtfully preserved historic details throughout.

Relax in the spacious living room with a large TV, or settle into the chair on the front porch for prime people-watching.

The main bath includes a European-style bidet.

A fully furnished garage apartment is also available. Search Basil Bungalow Guest House on Airbnb to book it. If this listing is unavailable, search Rosebud Retreat for our second bungalow just one block away.

A portable bed for one additional guest is available upon request.

Guest access
Guests access the entire house, front porch and backyard.

Other things to note
If you have more guests in your party needing a place to stay just search our adjacent property under BASIL BUNGALOW GUEST HOUSE (plaza midwood) or for our other two properties just a block away, ROSEBUD RETREAT BUNGALOW (plaza midwood) and ROSEBUD RETREAT GUEST HOUSE (plaza midwood) for additional lodging!

listing_name: Plaza Midwood private room and bath
description:
Private space with own entrance in the heart of historic Plaza Midwood - eclectic vibrant neighborhood 2 miles from uptown. Within walking distance to restaurants, bars, shops, markets.

The space
Plaza Midwood is by far the coolest place to be in this conservative city. NODA also has a lot going on and is very close by. Open minded people of all persuations call our area home and visitors are free to be themselves. The home itself is not over the top. It is humble and shabby-chic while tastefully true to the historic era. The yard is really lovely and fun if you enjoy big oak trees, plants, fountains, statuary and outdoor living.

Master Bedroom and bath with private entrance in back of house. Closed off to rest of house. Very private. Small fridge/no kitchen or cooking. Perfect for shorter term stays. cable, WiFi, fire place, courtyard/patio, convenient parking, smoking outside only

I live in front of house. I am very respectfull of your privacy while hospitable and friendly. I am tolerant, beer drinking, fun loving guy but, expect adult behavior from adults of any age so don't get crazy! I also have a very unpredictable schedule so please forgive me if we don't have a chance to meet. I do this every day so it happens. I have a self check in process that makes your entry and stay convenient for your unique schedule.

Dozens of restaurants within walking distance. Big grocery store, other shops (see Guidebook) Several bus stops within walking distance. 2 miles to downtown access to blue line light rail running south to Pineville area.

Buses run to uptown from several stops within walking distance. The city is 2 miles away. See the guidebook on Airbnb for all of our favorite local spots.

Guest access
The room is very private in back of house with own entrance. It is blocked off from rest of house. Has own bath. There is a small refrigerator in room. No kitchen. Convenient parking in back close to entrance. Lots of outdoor seating to hang out in good weather.

Before check in, you will receive a message about how to get into the room as I am not always at home or available during all check in times. Please READ the complete message for all instructions. PLEASE USE AIRBNB APP Or SITE FOR COMPLETE MESSAGES, DO NOT RELY ON YOUR TEXT APP. You do not need to knock on the door here to check in. I would be happy to meet you during your stay but, it is not required to check in and make yourself at home.

There is a locked door behind refrigerator that is to remain closed and locked at all times during your stay. It is not to be opened by anyone from either side for any reason.

Other things to note
There is no separate control for heating and air in the room.

A red recycling bin is available outside your door for glass, plastic, paper and cardboard.

For longer stays or excess trash, there is a gray trash container on wheels in alley across from side entrance/gate. The green one is for excess recyclables

I do not enter the room at all during your stay. Extra sheets & towels are provided for longer term reservations.

listing_name: Cozy Home, Hip Historic Hood, Near Uptown
description:
You will feel right at home in your back corner room with adjacent private bath. The guest room is inside my house.

The space
This vintage 1940 home is in the very heart of historic Plaza Midwood, 5 minutes to Uptown Charlotte (Hornets Arena, Panthers and Knights Stadiums, Museums, Arts Complex) , 3 blocks from grocery, post office, vibrant shopping and restaurant district. 15-20 minutes to airport, shopping malls, Carowinds, UNC Charlotte. Minutes to Carolinas Medical and other hospitals.

Room includes TV, wireless, fold out desk/chair, easy chair with ottoman, large closet, drawer space, adjacent private bathroom. Sit on lovely back porch in nice weather, eat in my breakfast nook.

Daily/Weekly guests have access to my refrigerator, coffee maker, tea kettle, toaster, toaster oven and microwave. Prefer that you not prepare full meals using my pots and pans.

Parking on street.

I will arrange an arrival time that works for both of us and will keep a few breakfast items in the refrigerator for you. I have a fairly busy schedule but will be happy to accommodate your needs as much as I can.

Plaza Midwood is an historic neighborhood, just minutes from the heart of uptown. It has been going through a renaissance over the past 10 years and is alive with shops and restaurants and still developing. You can walk 3 blocks to the intersection of Central Ave. and The Plaza which is the epicenter of the district. It is safe at night and a lovely neighborhood for walking at any time of year.

There is a free trolley a few blocks away that you can get to go into uptown. There are busses on Central Avenue that will take you uptown and from there you can get busses out to anywhere else in Charlotte, light rail runs out to the South End, and UNC Charlotte. Uber or a car is the most efficient way to get around if you are not spending much time uptown.

I do not allow pets, smoking, drugs or heavy alcohol use.
Females, Males or Couples are welcome for short stays.

Guest access
Lovely guest bedroom, Internet in room, desk, easy chair, own bathroom. Use my refrigerator, toaster, coffeemaker and microwave, breakfast nook, back porch, laundry.

Please do not eat or drink (other than water) in the bedroom. Please do not leave leftover food in my kitchen or refrigerator.

During your stay
I will accomodate your arrival and departure times as best I can. If you need anything just ask. You can tuck away in your room, or if you want conversation when I'm home that's fine too.

Other things to note
Stay here for far less than any nearby hotel or motel. But with the comfort and care of a real home.

description:
A 1930's bungalow with a name that makes you smile and a location that makes everything easy. The Laughing Frog sits in heart of urban Dilworth — one of Charlotte's most walkable, tree-lined neighborhoods — with coffee shops, restaurants, and Freedom Park all within a short stroll.

Dilworth is one of Charlotte's most popular, historic neighborhoods. You're a few blocks from Freedom Park — 98 acres of trails and greenspace, access to the Little Sugar Creek Greenway.

Uptown ten minutes away.

The space
Laughing Frog Bungalow is a 1200 square feet home built in the 1920's.
The house includes a beautifully decorated living and dining room, designed to provide a sanctuary within the city. The living room includes a Queen sleeper sofa and HD SMART TV with cable. The kitchen is fully stocked and includes pots, pans, and place settings. A stackable washer and dryer are also located in the kitchen. The intimate bedroom includes a Queen bed and all linens and pillows. The bathroom includes a shower with glass door and plenty of towels. A bedroom with twin bed (and room for desk) overlooks a private backyard provides a great 2nd BR or place to do a little work.
The bonus is a meditation/yoga room which gives a great space to get centered and stretch out before hitting the town.

Guest access
Inside you'll find a bright living room that flows into a dining area made for slow mornings and long conversations. The kitchen is fully stocked for cooking in, and there's a queen sleeper sofa if you need extra sleeping space.

A cozy nook off the main room works well as a workspace — small but private, good for catching up on emails or taking a call.

The main bedroom has a queen bed and opens to the bathroom. A second small room in back has a twin bed and looks out over the private backyard — good for a kid, a solo traveler, or someone who just wants their own quiet corner.

Out back there's a gated yard with a table, chairs, and a grill — plus parking inside the fence, which is rare around here.

Oh, and somewhere in the house you'll find a little laughing frog. He's been here longer than we have.

Other things to note
GOOD TO KNOW

Pets welcome with prior approval (pet fee applies)

Pack 'n play available on request (rental fee applies)

Tesla and Mercedes rentals available — ask for details when booking

SLEEPING ARRANGEMENTS

Main bedroom: 1 queen (sleeps 2)

Very Small Back room: 1 twin (sleeps 1) Ideal for child



Total: 3 beds, (comfortably 3)

Parking is available within the gated backyard.
There is a table, chairs and BBQ grill in private backyard.
There is space for bicycle storage.

*We have a pack n play crib that can be requested for your convenience. Rental fee will apply. Please let us know if needed when you book.

*We have a Tesla or Mercedes, please ask for details when you book, if interested.

description:
Welcome to your home away from home in Charlotte! Our spacious three-bedroom townhouse is in a great location, offering comfort, convenience, and easy access to everything the city has to offer. This bright, spacious home features an open layout, comfortable furnishings, and a fully equipped kitchen—perfect for families, business travelers, or small groups. Conveniently located near major highways, shopping, dining, and popular Charlotte attractions, making it easy to explore Uptown and beyond.

The space
We want you to feel that our house is your home away from home. Please relax and enjoy yourself!

We are in a great location to Uber, Lyft or Lime to everything including the airport and downtown.

The home features a bright, open layout with furnished living spaces designed for relaxing after a day of exploring. The fully equipped kitchen makes it easy to cook meals at home, while the dining and living areas are ideal for gathering with family or friends. Each bedroom is comfortably furnished, providing plenty of space for rest and privacy—perfect for families, business travelers, or small groups.

Enjoy the convenience of being close to major highways, shopping, dining, and popular Charlotte attractions, making it easy to get around the city whether you’re here for work or leisure. From Uptown Charlotte to local breweries, parks, and entertainment, everything is just a short drive away.

Whether you’re visiting for a weekend getaway, a work trip, or a longer stay, this well-located townhouse offers a comfortable and practical base for your Charlotte experience.

Guest access

Guest bedroom 1 has queen size Stearns & Foster (firm) mattress.

No parties or events allowed.

No cats allowed."

listing_name: A Night With The Muse - 1 bd.
description:
This 2-bedroom, 1-bath duplex is casually elegant, a place to rest your head and be inspired. Just blocks from the vibrant hub of Plaza Midwood, this space doubles as my personal residence and working atelier, where I create custom jewelry and fine art. It's curated like a living gallery, decorated in casual elegance and relaxed glamour. The art on the walls doesn’t just hang—it might flirt with you, maybe even steal your heart. If it does, you’re welcome to purchase a piece to take home.

The space
I love color and creativity, and my home is often my canvas to play. The environment inside is clean, tasteful with several pop of classy color and textures. Outside, you can rock on the porch under trees to enjoy the quaint quietness, or take a walk in the cozy, historic neighborhood to grab dinner, ice cream, a glass of wine, or yoga class.

My home is 2 bedrooms, 1 bath, an open living/dining room, kitchen, laundry room, and small fenced in back yard. There is also plenty of shared front and side yard space.



I do have two foster dogs that I decided to keep (Finn & Tinsel). Well behaved dogs are welcome with an additional pet deposit and approval prior to arrival.



Please Note:
The reviews regarding other housemates and noise are from when I lived in Boulder in 2012 next to the CU campus with 11 housemates), quite a different vibe. My place in Charlotte is peaceful and only myself and my two dogs.

Guest access
During your stay, you'll have access to the private bedroom. I will be residing in the studio room, and we’ll share the bathroom, kitchen, and living room. There’s also a small private yard area where you can sip your morning coffee or relax in the evening.

At times when I travel, the entire home is available for rent and can accommodate up to three guests. Please check my additional listing if you’re interested in booking the full space.

During your stay
I am here to help make your stay comfortable. I work out of the house and sometimes from home. I love giving tips on where to go and things to find what you need/want. Come and go as you please, and don't feel like you have to entertain me, and I don't want to get in the way of your plans.

Other things to note
I occasionally foster dogs, so you might share the space with a mellow, well-mannered canine who adds a warm and loving presence to the home. If you'd like to bring your own dog, I consider each request individually. Please include your dog’s age, breed, and temperament in your booking message. While I adore dogs, the home is best suited for calm and respectful fur ladies or gentlemen. If your dog is also a guest, he must be crated when left unattended.


My home is both my residence and a working atelier, where I create fine art and custom jewelry for myself, clients, and the Muse. While I maintain a clean and welcoming space, this is a lived-in, creative environment. You may notice small remnants of the process—paint drops on the floor, a smudge on a table, fingerprints of past creation. It’s part of the charm and soul of the space, where inspiration has room to breathe.


This is a 100% non-smoking property, both inside and outside. While I respect everyone's personal choices, if you are a smoker, everyone will be more comfortable with you finding a more suitable abode.


Lastly, I genuinely want you to have a fabulous, memorable stay in Charlotte and enjoy the uniqueness of my home, the neighborhood and city. That said, no parties or events are permitted. My home is a peaceful, artful sanctuary and best suited for guests who appreciate and honor that essence and vibe.

listing_name: Comfy private bed and bath
description:
My home is less than 10 minutes to city center, your private bedroom and bath awaits in this quiet urban neighborhood with free street parking.

No keys to lose or to return! This property provides secure, keyless entry with an August Smart Lock. You can lock and unlock the door with your smartphone.

The space
Your private bedroom and bath are conveniently located 5 miles from Uptown Charlotte. I-85 is 3.7 miles away, I-77 is about 4 miles and the airport is 14 miles away.

The historic neighborhoods NoDa, Plaza Midwood and Elizabeth, where many great restaurants, bars, coffee shops are located, are less than a 5 minute Uber ride away and are on bus routes from my house.

In your private room there is access to WiFi, a desk for belongings or laptop, and a TV. Your bed is made up with a deep air mattress on a bed frame and a memory foam underneath it and thick padding on top for maximum sleeping comfort.

Guest access
There is a small dedicated shelf for your food in the fridge and in the cupboard. Mostly used for snacks and drinks.

The laundry room is equipped with an iron and ironing board. (The cat litter boxes are located here too, --so you are not surprised.) If you need access to laundry it is available $5 per load.

The dining room and living room is open to you. There is no cable but there is a TV in your room with a high quality antenna that picks up network channels ABC, NBC, CBS, PBS, plus access to Netflix with your own password. The house has wireless internet. We do not have a computer or laptop available for your use.

On the front porch there is wicker chair to enjoy fresh air and views of feathered friends.

During your stay
I enjoy good company but the level of interaction is up to you and I will provide the privacy you need.

I want you to have a pleasant and memorable stay, so if you have questions or need information about the area please ask. I am happy to help with recommendations to local restaurants, music, arts, breweries, coffee houses and whatever else you seek during your stay.

Other things to note
Parking is available on the street in front of the house.

Anytime you leave the bedroom make sure the door is closed.

Make sure the front storm door closes. It has a tricky latch and needs a slight slam to catch. Please ensure the storm door is always latched and closed.

I do my best with the cat hair and some litter on the floor by sweeping at least daily, but even so, sometimes if I am really busy it can get away from me. I do not let them into your rooms, but sometimes other guests do.

I am happy to make your stay as pleasant as possible, and if something comes up I am happy to see if I can fix it. It is worth considering that if you are uncomfortable with or not really a fan of animals or cats, this location may not be the best fit for you.

I prohibit any form of mining bitcoin.

listing_name: Uptown Zen House - Fresh, new design!
description:
This uptown house in historic Wesley Heights is in the heart of it all. A beautiful two story home, 3BR / 2.5BA, located within a stone’s throw of Panther's Stadium, just outside the I-77/I-277 loop circling uptown Charlotte, and quick access to the heart of uptown Charlotte and all it has to offer. Designed with our guest's comfort in mind along with a Zen and peaceful aesthetic so that you can relax while away from home.

The space
This Craftsman style bungalow with it's own yard breaks the monotonous march of Charlotte center city condominiums. The house is fully and tastefully furnished, very spacious (2200+ SF), airy with lots of natural light beaming through all day. It has 12' ceilings throughout, Brazilian cherry hardwood floors, premium italian stone countertops, cherry cabinets, stainless steel appliances, gas fireplace, etc... Lela Court is surrounded by many wonderful restaurants and stores, you never have to go far from home. The Panthers Stadium and Bobcats arena are also very close so you can always quickly catch an exciting, live football, baseball or basketball game. The neighborhood is very safe and convenient, walking distance to greenway, park, Panther's Stadium, restaurants, Gateway Center, Johnson & Wales, uptown, etc..The master suite is on the main level, is very private, spacious with a vaulted trey ceiling and ceiling fan. The closet is a huge walk-in closet with plenty of space for all your belongings and more. The private master bathroom has italian tiled shower, double vanity marble sinks and italian tiled floors. The living room / kitchen area are also on the main floor and fully equipped for your comfort and enjoyment. There are 2 additional rooms (one of them with a private balcony) upstairs and a Jack & Jill full bathroom. There is never any hassle with parking as there is ample free parking right in front of the house and also in the back of the house.

Guest access
The front door is equipped with a keyless entry for easy 24 hours access.

Other things to note
If you need sleeping accommodations for more than 4 people (additional per guest charge applies after 4 guests) please let me know.

Trained, house-broken pets are allowed with prior approval and on an individual case basis - additional fees apply. Please ask for more info.

listing_name: South End Stunner in Heart of it all-3 BR Townhome
description:
Experience the Heart of South End! Our 4-floor townhouse offers 3 beds, 3 baths, and a rooftop patio. An extra office space with fiber internet and a daybed is ready to flex with your needs.

Steps from vibrant dining and shops. Private 1-car garage, light rail 5 mins away means you are connected to all the city has to offer.

Spacious, spotless, and convenient—ideal for business or leisure. Book now for a true South End immersion!

The space
Welcome to the heart of South End, Charlotte, where comfort meets convenience. Our 4-floor townhouse offers three bedrooms, three bathrooms, and a rooftop patio. Additional features include a flex office space with a convenient daybed, Fiber internet, and a fully equipped kitchen and dining area.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant South End neighborhood, steps away from top-rated restaurants, bars, and shops. The private garage provides peace and security, while street parking is also convenient. A lightrail stop just a 5-minute walk ensures that you are well connected to all the city has to offer.

The townhouse boasts spacious interiors, spotless cleanliness, and thoughtful amenities. Experience the convenience of easy-to-follow instructions, ensuring a hassle-free stay. Whether you're here for business or leisure, this townhouse provides the perfect blend of comfort and accessibility. As it is noted it is a 4 story townhouse, there are many stairs in the home.

Book now to experience the vibrancy of South End living and elevate your Charlotte stay in this beautifully appointed townhouse!

Guest access
Entire 4-floor townhouse and one car garage.

Keypad access for seamless check-in and hassle free check-out.

Other things to note
When making your reservation, PLEASE VERIFY that you have the CORRECT GUEST COUNT entered prior to confirming your booking.

As a reminder, this property is still a residential area and we ask that you keep noise to a minimum during the later evening hours to not disturb our neighbors.

Do not park in the back drive, only parking allowed is in townhouse garage. Otherwise street parking is readily available or paid parking deck across the street.

* 2 bedrooms
- One queen bed, one full size bed; All linens provided.

Beginner supplies, papertowels, bags, coffee, toilet paper, etc( extended stay will need to provide their own after that)

Please do not try to connect the jets to the tub and understand that they are non-operational for a reason.)

description:
This 2 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom Townhouse is in the heart of it all, situated in Charlotte's historic and charming Wesley Heights in 3rd Ward. Of all Charlotte’s historic neighborhoods, Wesley Heights may be the best-kept secret. Located due west of Uptown and within a stone’s throw of Bank of America's Panthers Stadium. Convenience to uptown, highways, and all that Uptown has to offer is key for modern urbanites today. The townhouse was built only a few years ago and opens up to a pergola area.

The space
This 2 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom modern Townhouse is in the heart of it all.. the house is a beautiful two story home in Charlotte's historic and charming Wesley Heights in 3rd Ward. Of all Charlotte’s historic neighborhoods, Wesley Heights may be the best-kept secret. Located due west of Uptown and within a stone’s throw of Bank of America Stadium (Go Panthers!) Convenience is key to Wesley Heights’ popularity. The neighborhood sits just outside the I-77/I-277 loop circling uptown Charlotte, and the entrance to I-77 is a half-mile away. With shady, safe suburban tree-lined streets, plenty of parking, combined with quick access to uptown, Wesley Heights holds the same appeal for Charlotte urbanites today as when it was originally built in the 1920's. It is also walking distance to the greenway that goes through Frazier park (tennis, soccer, jogging, biking, dog play area, etc..) which leads you to gateway center uptown. Great for business travel, weekend get-aways, sports weekends, convention stay, or just your visit to the Charlotte area! Feel right at home while away from home.

The townhouse was built a few years ago, is very spacious (over 1500sf) and airy with lots of natural light beaming through all day. It has 10' ceilings throughout, premium, cherry cabinets, gas fireplace, etc... it was just beautifully furnished with your absolute enjoyment and comfort in mind.

Lela Court is surrounded by many wonderful restaurants and stores which are walking distance and you never have to go far from home. The Panthers Stadium is also walking distance and Time Warner arena also very close so you can always quickly catch an exciting, live football, basketball game or a concert.

The living room / Dinning room, half bath and kitchen are on the main floor and fully equipped for your comfort and enjoyment. The bedrooms and laundry room are upstairs upstairs. Each bedroom is a master and has it's own full bathroom. The backyard area opens up to a large and gorgeous Pergola/grill area where you can entertain your friends and family right in the back of the house.

There is never any hassle with parking as there is ample free street parking right in front of the house (a rarity in the center city area).

Guest access

Other things to note
If you need sleeping accommodations for more than 4 people (additional per guest charge applies after 4 guests) please let me know. The couch opens up and turn into a bed with a real mattress as well.

Trained, house-broken pets are allowed with prior approval and on an individual case basis - additional fees apply. Please ask for more info.

listing_name: Wonderful Home in the City. Steps to BofA Stadium.
description:
** Located in a residential neighborhood **
** No parties or events permitted **
** No loud outdoor activity after 9 PM **

This beautiful Uptown home was recognized as one of “The Coolest Short-Term Rentals in the Queen City” by Charlotte’s Got A Lot, a leading publication for the Charlotte area. Enjoy elegant touches throughout the home, a classic Southern front porch with rocking chairs and a swing, and a backyard fire pit perfect for relaxing with friends and family.

The space
THE HOME
This charming home offers a comfortable place to stay in the heart of Uptown’s 3rd Ward, one of the most walkable areas in Charlotte. Inside the home you’ll find:
• Comfortable living spaces
• Stylish finishes and elegant details
• A welcoming front porch with rocking chairs and a swing
• Outdoor seating and a fire pit for evening gatherings

The location makes it easy to experience the best of Charlotte while enjoying a quiet residential setting.

THE NEIGHBORHOOD:
The home is located in Uptown’s 3rd Ward, the pretties residential district in the city, and one of the most convenient and walkable areas of Charlotte. You can easily walk to:
• Bank of America Stadium (Carolina Panthers, MLS, Concerts)
• Truist Field (Charlotte Knights baseball)
• Romare Bearden Park
• Restaurants, bars, and all the entertainment in Uptown

GETTING AROUND:
Getting around is extremely easy from this location.
• 5 minute walk to Bank of America Stadium.
• 10 minute drive to Charlotte Douglas International Airport
• 10-minute walk to the light rail
• B-cycle station nearby for bike rentals
• Electric scooters available throughout Uptown for quick trips around the city

Most guests simply walk throughout Uptown to restaurants, parks, stadiums, and entertainment. Uber and Lyft are also readily available, and many of Charlotte’s other popular neighborhoods—such as South End, NoDa, and Plaza Midwood—are only about a 5-minute ride away. This central location makes it easy to explore the best of Charlotte while staying in the heart of the city.

Guest access
Guests will have access to the entire home during their stay. Amenities include:
• Free Wi-Fi
• 55\ TV with Roku and Netflix
• Keurig coffee maker
• Washer and dryer
• Gas BBQ grill
• Outdoor fire pit

Other things to note
• Strict no-party and no-event policy
• Quiet hours begin at 9 PM"

listing_name: Entire Basement Suite,Cozy Fireplace,GREAT Locale!
description:
Enjoy coffee in this charming 850sf basement suite in a historic Charlotte neighborhood w/Greenway access, bike trails, & great places to eat/drink nearby. Watch birds play in Brier Creek out back. Private entrance closed off from the main house. Queen bedroom, attached bath, living room, & laundry. Play shuffleboard or watch AmazonPrime on the comfy couch by the fireplace. Blowup mattress available on request. Small frig/freezer, sink, microwave, coffeemaker, etc. Dark room for restful sleep.

The space
Full finished basement with a walk out covered patio where you can enjoy grilling out while you overlook Brier Creek. This is a 2-story house. We live upstairs (that’s right, we actually own it, not a conglomerate), and have blocked off a completely separated space for your privacy. The back yard is always in bloom. Very peaceful setting. Please feel free to wash and dry your clothes in our laundry room. You can request for me to light up the gas fireplace and play board games on the big coffee table or watch a movie on Amazon Prime. Good WiFi signal. Bedroom is dark, so you should sleep well.

Guest access
You will be able to access the full basement with your own key. Entrance is in the back of the house. You can park out front and walk down the driveway (pretty steep!) around back (gate is open), or pull around back to park under the deck at the basement entrance. Careful if pulling around as the gate entrance is narrow. Also, careful pulling in and out of the driveway as there is a pretty big dropoff...just go slow. The door to access upstairs is locked.

Other things to note
Please let me know if you need the full blowup mattress, cornhole set, or fireplace pilot lit. Amazon Prime available. Fire extinguisher is located under the bathroom sink. If you walk up/down the driveway when it is wet, the middle is very slippery, so be VERY careful and walk on the sides.

My beautiful studio, built above my garage behind my house with separate street access and private parking in the garage, is a stones-throw distance from the Music Factory, Uptown, and all of the most popular up-and-coming Charlotte neighborhoods, including South End, NoDa, Plaza Midwood, Dilworth, and Elizabeth.

This studio is above my standalone garage, and you can park your car securely inside the garage!

You'll have access to a full studio apartment, including access to cable TV (streaming YouTube TV service) on a 50 inch big screen LCD Smart TV, iPad and soon a G oogle Home Speaker to control YouTube TV and entertainment apps, living area, full kitchen with refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, sink, pots and pans, and kitchen utensils.

There is also a Keurig with K-Cups, creamer, and Stevia, pint glasses, wine glasses, bowls and plates, paper towels, and utensils.

You'll also have access to an EXTREMELY comfortable Green Tea Memory Foam Mattress (the most raved about part about staying in my Studio), and a full bathroom with blow dryer, towels, hand soap, body soap, and a full cabinet suite over the toilet.

Also included are an iron and ironing board, and soon to come will be a full washer and dryer.

If you love being close to the action-packed areas of Uptown, South End, NoDa, Plaza Midwood, and Elizabeth, you'll LOVE staying at my place!

Guest access
You have access to the entire studio apartment, including a full kitchen, refrigerator, stove, microwave, full bathroom, living area with access to G oogle Home Speaker, cable TV, Netflix, and several other entertainment options via ChromeCast.

TV Instructions:
Power the TV on with the standard remote, and then select from YouTube TV or Netflix. Once you figured out what you want to watch, there is a square button in the upper right corner - tap that button and select Guest Room (or Living Room if you’re hanging out there). The content will then stream directly to the TV in HD.

Select YouTube TV (notice that is TV, not just plain old YouTube) for cable channels and live television. Select Netflix for movies and shows to watch.

Otherwise, let me know if you have questions and enjoy!

Other things to note
IMPORTANT, PLEASE READ!!! Please note that the space is located above my garage, which is behind my house, so check-in is a little unusual! There is a separate road that runs parallel to Woodward Avenue, and you will need to turn Right at Bending Birch Place just before approaching my house. Then you will make a quick left, and drive to the 7th garage down (dark tan standalone garage/studio with 2 stories).

description:

This 2-bedroom, 1-bath retreat sits in a quiet neighborhood yet is close to everything Charlotte has to offer.Walk to Bojangles Coliseum, Ovens Auditorium, the Park Expo, Sal’s Pizza, and Vaulted Oak Brewery. The space

Enjoy your free time relaxing on the leather couch watching the 50” TV, reading on the enclosed porch, or catching up on emails in the study.

The place is artfully decorated, featuring original works purchased from a local artist.

Every room is fully furnished and we provide linens and towels for use during your stay. A washer and dryer is on premises for guests on extended stays (or if you’re traveling light). We keep paper and soap stocked between guests. And if you would like a particular amenity not listed here, just shoot me a message and I’ll try my best to accommodate it!

listing_name: Private carriage house in the heart of Charlotte
description:
Charming, cozy, completely private studio apartment in the heart of Charlotte. Located in the historic, walkable Elizabeth neighborhood, 2 miles from uptown. Thoughtfully furnished with a stylish blend of vintage and modern pieces. Full kitchen, private washer/dryer, lots of closet space. Within walking distance to 2 major hospitals (Novant & Atrium), the Greenway, the Visualite Theater and fabulous restaurants and bars in the trendy Plaza Midwood neighborhood and in stately Myers Park.

The space
Elizabeth is one of Charlotte’s oldest neighborhoods, with sidewalks, tree-lined streets and architecturally significant craftsman bungalows.
Owner’s detached house is a historic 1928 bungalow, listed on the National Historic Preservation Registry. The craftsman style carriage house is self check-in with ample storage, washer/dryer, 3 closets, loveseat, queen bed, work desk, full kitchen, and shower/tub. The apartment is on the second story of the carriage house above the garage.

The space is carefully cleaned by the owner using only natural cleaning supplies made with Doterra essential oils.

Guest access
The code for the keyless entry will be messaged to you. You'll have private access to the upstairs studio apartment, and sole use of the washer and dryer in the garage itself. (We may enter the garage to grab a tool).

listing_name: Windy Hill, A Tranquil Retreat in East Charlotte
description:
WINDY HILL: A Tranquil Retreat for ages 25 & up
A quiet apartment adjoins a main house on five acres of woods and pastures. Located in east Charlotte, it's an easy drive to Uptown (20 minutes). The apartment has a separate outside entry & parking. Bedroom has luxury king bedding, ample storage, black-out curtains, small desk area, closet, & en suite bath. Relax in an eclectic living/dining/work area with Smart TV. Kitchen includes dishes, cookware, and breakfast items.

The space
This is a great spot for business travelers who want a change of pace, for singles or couples looking for a quiet getaway, or for parents visiting adult children. It's a pet-free, smoke-free rental. Please note that we do not host first-time users of Air BnB and the apartment is not suitable for babies, toddlers, or children.

Guest access
Guests have access to the full apartment, which includes a bedroom, bathroom, small kitchen with all of the basics, and a living/dining area with sofa, wing chair, Smart TV, work table, and dining space. Books and magazines are provided for your enjoyment. Feel free to explore the property and visit the donkeys. A map is included in the guest guide. Let us know if you need a picnic blanket or folding chair.

Other things to note
We offer discounts for weekly and monthly stays. If you want to stay longer than 30 days, just send us a message. As a guest, there are several things you should know. First, there is not a washer/dryer. There are laundromats nearby, and we launder household linens on Saturdays for those staying longer than a week. Secondly, we're on a well and septic system. We've been told that the water in our area is the best in the county, and we can vouch that it's delicious. However, bottled water is provided as an option if you don't feel comfortable drinking well water. Next, this is an older home with one thermostat located in the owner's quarters. We're happy to adjust the temperature at any time to keep you comfortable. And lastly, the heat pumps are in an outdoor enclosed area between the bedroom and the patio. When they're on, you may hear them from the bedroom and you'll definitely hear them from the patio. We've had one complaint in all the years we've been Airbnb hosts (which may say more about our kind guests than the noise). In case the noise bothers you, the fan in the bedroom closet can be used to create white noise.

• Light Rail Station to Uptown
(2 min walk)

• 5 min drive to Bank of America Stadium
• 3 bedrooms each with private bathroom, 3 queen beds and large sofa
• Keurig Coffee Maker
• Family friendly in upcoming Biddleville neighborhood!

Note: Guest booking must register with us and provide photo ID prior to check-in.

Guest access
Entire space is included in this rental. Please, make yourself at home.

Other things to note
+ We are unable to accommodate early check in or late check out. Please plan your arrival and departure with this in mind.

+ We don't provide cable TV, but we offer Roku that will allow you to get some free channels on Pluto TV or login to your preferred streaming apps like Sling, Youtube TV, Netflix, Hulu, etc.

+ We often leave sheets/towels in the dryer as we don't have time to wait for everything to dry. This is normal and you are free to use the sheets/towels or move them from the dryer as needed.

+ No more than 3 cars may park in the parking area. $50 fee if more than 3 cars are parked as this takes spaces from the other units.

+ During the summer you may want to set your thermostat to 75-78 degrees every day the outside temperature is 90 degrees or higher. The AC will only cool the rental to approximately 78 to 82 degrees inside when the outside temperature is extremely high. Please also understand that HVAC technicians will be busy increasing response times to HVAC issues.
We recommend keeping doors and windows shut and ceiling fans on running. You may also want to close the blinds and limit using the oven to keep the home cooler during the day.

+Outdoor Security Cameras located at the front and rear of the house. Audio and video recording.

listing_name: Plaza Midwood Carriage House - Quiet & Private
description:
Enjoy the peace and privacy of a luxurious carriage house in popular Plaza Midwood! A newly completed, full apartment with all the amenities of home. You'll have a private entrance, full state-of-the-art kitchen, king bedroom, comfortable living room, and laundry room. It's less than a mile to one of Charlotte's most fun scenes, with restaurants, breweries, and nightlife nearby. Plus, it's only an $8 uber ride to uptown Charlotte. Experience the convenience and luxury of your own carriage house.

The space
Could you use some space to socially distance in style? This classic and beautiful home is filled with all the amenities of a modern house, but all the charm of a historic neighborhood. It's bright, peaceful, private, spotlessly clean, and welcoming. You'll even find some family antiques and some handmade pottery (by the owner's mother) to help you feel right at home. It's a great place for relaxing and recharging, and if you're up for more, it's only a 10 minute drive to uptown charlotte, a 15 minute walk to the heart of Central Avenue, and a 1 minute walk to the nearest bus stop. Come and experience some architectural charm and southern hospitality!

Guest access
Included in this carriage house are a comfortable living room with cable TV and wifi, an open kitchen that's full sized and fully appointed, a gorgeous bathroom, a king-sized master bedroom, and a stackable washer/dryer.

The yard space, patio, and porch of the main house are reserved for the owners.

Other things to note
Parking: While there are no dedicated parking spaces for the carriage house, there is plenty of street parking available on both Club Road and Truman Avenue. As a safety measure, please be sure to remove all valuables and lock your vehicle.

Pack & Play: We have a Pack & Play available if need it. If you want to use it, please let us know in a message when you make your reservation.

listing_name: Modern Myers Park 1BR · Ground Floor · near Uptown
description:
Settle into the historic charm of Myers Park in this bright ground-floor retreat. Surrounded by tree-lined streets, the home offers a calm residential setting just minutes from Freedom Park, Atrium CMC, and Uptown. Inside, an airy open layout creates an easy, livable space designed for comfort and flow. Ideal for professionals, couples, and longer stays seeking a refined yet relaxed Charlotte experience.

The space
This boutique ground-floor retreat offers an airy living area designed for effortless comfort and flow. The king bedroom, dressed in high-quality linens, offers a cozy and restful place to recharge. Accessibility features such as grab bars in the shower and a dedicated handicap parking space just outside the entrance provide added comfort and convenience. Full kitchen, in-unit laundry, and included parking add practical convenience, creating a smooth and comfortable stay in a quiet residential setting.

❤️ Why Guests Love This Home
• Cozy king bed in the primary bedroom with soft linens for a restful night’s sleep

Guest access
You’ll enjoy private access to the entire apartment.
🔑 Check-in: 4 PM – 10 PM

🏁 Check-out: 10 AM

Secure keyless entry via a unique combination for contact-free check-in.

​
Rental Agreement:
Guests must be 21+ to book (verified for security only)

Pets
Dogs only (max 2). $59/per pet may be collected
All pets must be registered before arrival. Unregistered pets $120 per pet may be collected.
Pet owners must provide breed.

listing_name: Historic King Suite · Step-Free · Myers Park
description:
Tucked along historic Queens Road, this boutique ground-floor retreat blends quiet luxury with effortless city access. Stroll beneath willow oaks to nearby cafés or drive minutes to Uptown, Atrium Health CMC, and Freedom Park. Featuring a spacious king bed and free parking, the home is designed for a relaxed, low-stress stay. Ideal for professionals, couples, and longer visits seeking comfort in one of Charlotte’s most charming neighborhoods.

The space
Located on the ground level, the layout is designed for easy living and comfort. The open living space connects naturally to a practical kitchen, while the king bedroom offers a calm place to recharge. The home also includes accessibility-friendly features such as grab bars in the shower and a dedicated handicap parking space just outside the entrance for added ease and convenience. In-unit laundry and on-site parking make longer stays simple, and the overall feel is cozy, quiet, and easy to settle into.

❤️ Why Guests Love This Home
• Cozy king bed in the primary bedroom with soft linens for a restful night’s sleep
• Chic, art-filled living room showcasing local artwork by Nico Amortegui for a warm, boutique feel
• Fully equipped kitchen for real cooking with a gas range, countertops, and dining seating for four
• Large TV in bedroom plus free fast Wi-Fi and Hulu Live TV
• Shared outdoor patio and seating for relaxed lounging
• Walk-in shower with a starter supply kit of quality toiletries provided
• In-unit washer and dryer
• On-site parking available on a first-come, first-served basis in a private lot
• Pet-friendly accommodations
• Quality linens, complimentary snacks, and thoughtful touches throughout
• Fitness-minded guests enjoy convenient access to Charlotte’s Dowd YMCA, just five minutes away (7-day pass available for $50)

Guest access
You’ll enjoy private access to the entire apartment.
🔑 Check-in: 4 PM – 10 PM
(Arriving after 10 PM? Please let us know to ensure a smooth after-hours check-in.)
🏁 Check-out: 10 AM
(Early check-in or late check-out may be available for an additional compensation.)
Secure keyless entry via a unique combination for contact-free check-in.

Other things to note
We want your stay to be as enjoyable and stress-free as possible! Please review the following guidelines carefully before booking.
​
Rental Agreement:
Guests must be 21+ to book (verified for security only)
A rental agreement will be provided before check-in.
As per the NC Vacation Rental Act, payment, signature, and/or taking possession of the property serves as acceptance.
The booking guest must complete the check-in form with a valid government ID. Missing or inaccurate information may result in cancellation without refund.
​
Additional information
Please lock all doors and windows when leaving.
Unauthorized late departures $200 may be collected.
Optional workstation rental available with monitor, keyboard, and mouse.
We provide a starter kit of supplies, any additional supplies needed must be purchased

Quiet Hours
Quiet hours begin at 10 PM.
Please respect neighbors and keep noise to a minimum.
Only registered guests are allowed on the property.
Parties or large gatherings are not permitted. Any violation $300 may be collected and termination of your stay without refund.

Pets
Dogs only (max 2). $59/per pet may be collected
All pets must be registered before arrival. Unregistered pets $120 per pet may be collected.
Pet owners must provide breed.
Pets are not allowed on furniture or bedding. Excessive hair or damage cleaning charges of $250 plus the cost of any damages may be collected.
Guests are responsible for cleaning up pet waste around the property (waste stations are conveniently located around the property).
Any pet that continues to disrupt other guest's and their ability to relax and enjoy their stay may result in a cancellation of your reservation with no refund.

Parking
Free onsite parking available.

Smoking
Absolutely no smoking.
If smoke odor or remnants are found inside, a $500 cleaning charges may be collected.

Damages & Conduct:
Please report any damage immediately. We know accidents happen, and we ask guests to be truthful when they do
Guests are responsible for any excessive damage caused during their stay.
​
Internet Use:
The Internet is provided for general use.
​
Trash:
Trash should fit in the outdoor bins provided.
​
Optional Extras:
Computer, monitor, and mouse available for rent at $10/day.
Family Items: Pack ’n Play or highchair available with 24 hr notice.
Eight private residences share this historic building.

Enjoy a chef’s kitchen, fast Wi-Fi, plenty of free parking, multiple private workspaces, 2 living rooms, laundry & relaxing deck. The space
Very rare 8 bedroom home close to Uptown Charlotte and South End. Open floor plan with kitchen, dining and living room all joined in one large living space which is great for large families, work groups or friend gatherings. kitchen is well appointed and room layouts provide lots of space to spread out. Newly finished basement/game room with TV and half bath. Walkable to bars and restaurants and ample dedicated parking for those staying at the home.

Spacious & Comfortable Retreat – 8 Bedrooms, Perfect for Groups and work travel!

Book your stay today and enjoy a relaxing experience!

listing_name: Walk to Light Rail from a Roomy Basement Apartment
description:
Welcome to your cozy hideaway in the heart of the LoSo neighborhood, Charlotte! Unwind in this charming basement AirBnB boasting modern comforts and urban flair. With a full kitchen, laundry facilities, and exposed pipe shower, every detail exudes comfort and style. Ideal for a business retreat or city adventure, immerse yourself in one of Charlotte's most popular neighborhoods, then retreat to your private sanctuary for a restful night's sleep. Your perfect Charlotte getaway awaits!

The space
In addition to the basement apartment, there is a large walkout, covered patio with doors to the patio from both the living area and the bedroom. The shower has modern exposed piping including a hand sprayer. We will provide miniature shampoos and soaps (just like a hotel would!). There is a second smart TV in the bedroom with cable and Netflix. Free parking in the dedicated parking space. The kitchen is a full size kitchen with full size appliances and a separate laundry room with washer/dryer. Keurig w/ free coffee pods, as well as tea, creamer, and sugar. Happy to provide recommendations as requested!

The apartment is on the edge of the Sedgefield neighborhood in Southwest Charlotte. It's minutes from excellent restaurants and craft breweries. This is a rapidly growing area due to the proximity of the light rail, but still feels small.

Guest access
The entire basement apartment and covered patio are for the use of our guests!
There is smartphone access for the door via the August app and backup plans if needed. The August app requires a phone number so we ask your Airbnb contact information to be up to date. The app will work for the entirety of your stay.

There is a designated parking space and private entrance. We are also 0.5 miles to the light rail (and bus station), a 10 minute drive to Uptown and Southpark, and only 15 minutes to the airport.

Other things to note
This is a walkout basement apartment. There is a completely separate second Airbnb on the main and second floors. Although we have put extra insulation in between the floors during construction, you may still hear other guests at various times during the day and evening. We do our best to make all our guests comfortable and ask all guests to be considerate neighbors!

description:
Welcome to our modern South-End townhome in Charlotte (1 k ft from light-rail)

Enjoy this earth-inspired, open-concept townhome. Equipped w/ an over-sized sectional couch & table, fully-equipped kitchen, private 4th floor patio w/ skyline views, and 2 cozy bedrooms outfitted w/ queen beds + fresh linens!

Easy walk to breweries, dining, shopping and other entertainment.

RSVP 1k ft
Suffolk Punch . 2 mi
Publix .2 mi
Link & Pin .3 mi
Waterman .4 mi
Pins Mechanical .5 mi
Indaco Italian .6 mi

The space
When you enter the home from the private garage, you’ll immediately be greeted by a mudroom and the first full bathroom. Shortly thereafter your first bedroom is closed by two barn doors. This bedroom is equipped with an open concept closet and sofa-bed with trundle.

As you head upstairs you’ll be struck with the open concept living room, family room, reading nook, and kitchen. Almost all walls are windows which gives you a unique 270 degree view of the neighborhood when the electric blinds are up! The kitchen is fully stocked and comes ready with coffee maker, blender, crockpot, airfrier etc
Heading upstairs you’ll hit a landing which is where the laundry/iron/ironing board sits.

To your left and right you’ll be able to enter the bedrooms (each with in-room bathrooms and closets). Both bedrooms have nearly floor to ceiling windows equipped with darkening blinds.

Once you head back to the landing, going up the last flight of stairs will lead to the almost 200 sq ft astro -turf sun deck! There is a doggy door that allows access to this for your pet’s convenience. From this deck, you can see the whole neighborhood come alive as you drink in the sky-line view of the city! A perfect spot for refreshments, enjoying friends and family’s company, or entertaining company!

Guest access
The whole house except for storage on rooftop and a maid closet.

Other things to note
There is a printed guide that is located in your unit to help you navigate the neighborhood and greater region of Charlotte. This guide is available for PDF download by scanning the QR code located in the kitchen. Consider this to be a digital concierge for your stay.

For your kids:
There is an oversized chalk board attached to the wall in case inspiration might strike yourself or your kids. Any lewd images or words will incur a fee!!

For your furry kids:
The 4th floor has a doggy door which allows your dog to easily let themselves out to use the bathroom on the astro-turf lawn. Please pick up after your dogs an additional clean up fee will be applied!!

For you:
There is a bath-tub in the 2nd bedroom for those that wish to relax and take a bubble bath (or an ice bath!).

For your stay:
Wi-Fi is easily accessed and available across all 3 floors (not the roof) of the town-house. The TV in the family room is ULTRAHD and AirPlay enabled. An AirPlay monitor is also available for work in the office.

The whole unit is a smart unit so the air, carbon monoxide alarms, external doors, are automated.

listing_name: A Classic Urban Cottage, Comfortable and Stylish.
description:
10 Min from great shops/restaurants
Close to the light rail & stadiums
Historic Neighbourhood

A unique 1930’s bungalow with adorable character embellished with updated design, like quartz counter tops, cozy lighting and comfortable furnishings. Superior bedding, towels and all the comforts of an exclusive hotel. Close to Charlottes restaurants, coffee shops and markets. Experience uptown or relax and enjoy some tranquility on a gorgeous porch with the cool breeze and chirping birds.

The space
Cozy Sleeping Quarters: Two queen bedrooms and a Twin room all designed for a restful night's sleep.

Well equipped Chef’s Kitchen: with pantry and coffee maker. Large dining area that seats 5.

Two Queen size bedrooms with comfortable beds, feather duvets, firm and soft pillows. Each room has plenty of hanging space for clothes. Twin bedroom with one twin bed, fluffy duvet, firm and soft pillows and a place to hang clothes.

Elegant Bathroom on the main level with a bath, shower, toilet, towel warmer and sink.

Outdoor Living Space: A sprawling front deck area equipped with plenty of seating to relax and watch the world go by.


Relaxing Lounge Area: A cozy lounge with a TV for entertainment and an additional bathroom equipped with a toilet and sink.

This beautifully appointed home ensures a comfortable and memorable stay for you and your guests.

Guest access
When you arrive at the Urban Cottage you will have the check in details to let yourself in. There is some local restaurant and activity information in the dining room to help you navigate your way around Charlotte. After that you are my guest and you have access to the entire house. If you have any questions I am available by airbnb messenger to help you out.

Other things to note
The Urban Cottage is a quick walk to the light rail stop “Bland street station” for uptown and the rail trail provides a nice walk to restaurants, shopping and breweries. Enjoy leaving your car while you attend a game at the stadium or concert at the spectrum centre.
Local restaurants within 5 minutes walk from the cottage, Wooden Robot Brewery, Pie Za Za Pizza, Hawthornes Pizza, Sushi Hana, Flower Child and Resident Culture are all favorites.

description:
Spacious 3BR/3BA townhome near Uptown! Each bedroom has its own private bathroom. Sleeps 6 comfortably.

Free parking for up to 3 cars.

Just 5 minutes to downtown Charlotte and Bank of America Stadium. Fully furnished with equipped kitchen, WiFi, smart TV, and washer/dryer.
Perfect for families, groups, or business travelers.

Message us to book!

Note: Photo ID required prior to check-in.

The space
Welcome to your spacious Charlotte townhome! This 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom property offers the perfect combination of space, privacy, and convenience with unbeatable access to Uptown and major highways.

🏠 The Townhome

Bedrooms (3 Total - Each with Private Bathroom!)
- Bedroom 1: Queen bed with quality linens, closet space, and private ensuite bathroom
- Bedroom 2: Queen bed with quality linens, closet space, and private ensuite bathroom
- Bedroom 3: Queen bed with quality linens, closet space, and private ensuite bathroom

The biggest perk? No bathroom sharing! Each guest or couple gets complete privacy with their own dedicated bathroom.

Bathrooms (3 Full)
- Three full bathrooms with tub/shower combinations
- Fresh towels and basic toiletries provided
- Each bedroom has its own private bath

Living Area
- Comfortable seating perfect for gathering after a day exploring Charlotte
- Smart TV for streaming your favorite shows and movies
- Open layout connecting to kitchen and dining area
- Plenty of space for everyone to relax together

Kitchen & Dining
- Fully equipped kitchen with all major appliances
- Refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, and dishwasher
- Cookware, dishes, utensils, and all cooking essentials
- Coffee maker for your morning routine
- Dining table with seating for your group

Additional Features
- In-unit washer and dryer - pack light!
- High-speed WiFi throughout
- Climate control heating and cooling
- Parking lot on-site
- Your own private entrance

📍 Location - Quick Access to Everything

Highway Access
Right off I-77 and 277, making it incredibly easy to get anywhere in Charlotte quickly. No navigating complicated city streets to reach your destination.

Uptown Charlotte
Less than 5 minutes to downtown! Easy commute to:
- Corporate offices and business district
- Charlotte Convention Center
- Bank of America Stadium
- Spectrum Center
- Museums and attractions
- Hospitals and medical facilities

Perfect For

Small Groups & Families
Three bedrooms with private bathrooms mean everyone has their own space and privacy. No awkward bathroom schedules!

Corporate Travelers
Multiple business travelers can stay comfortably together with individual bedroom/bathroom suites. Quick commute to downtown offices.

Healthcare Professionals
Traveling nurses or medical staff on assignment will love the proximity to Charlotte's major hospitals and the privacy of individual bathrooms.

Relocating Professionals
Perfect temporary housing while you get settled in Charlotte and search for permanent housing.

Friends Visiting Together
Each person or couple gets their own bedroom and bathroom - the best way to travel with friends!

Guest access
You'll have exclusive access to your entire private townhome unit during your stay.

Your Access Includes:

- The entire 3-bedroom, 3-bathroom townhome
- All three bedrooms, each with private ensuite bathroom
- Living room, kitchen, and dining areas
- In-unit washer and dryer
- Parking lot on-site
- Your own private entrance

Please note: This is one side of a duplex property. There may be guests staying in the adjacent unit, but each side has completely separate entrances and no shared spaces. You'll have total privacy in your unit.

The townhome is completely yours to enjoy!

Other things to note
🏘️ Duplex Property

This townhome is one side of a duplex. You have your own completely private entrance and no shared spaces with the other unit. However, you may encounter guests coming and going from the adjacent unit. Please be courteous and respectful of your neighbors.

⏰ Check-In/Check-Out Times

We are unable to accommodate early check-in or late check-out requests. Please plan your arrival and departure accordingly. Standard times will be provided in your check-in instructions.

🧺 Laundry & Linens

You may find clean sheets or towels in the dryer when you arrive—this is completely normal! We often leave them there between turnovers since we don't have time to wait for everything to dry. Feel free to use them or move them aside as needed.

📺 Entertainment

The townhome does not include cable TV. However, we provide a Roku device with access to free channels (Pluto TV) and you can log into your own streaming accounts (Sling TV, YouTube TV, Netflix, Hulu, etc.).

🚗 Parking - 3 Car Maximum

Free parking for up to 3 cars is included in the parking area. NO MORE THAN 3 CARS may park on the property. A $50 fee will be charged for each additional vehicle, as extra cars take spaces away from other units. Please respect this limit.

📹 Security Cameras

Outdoor security cameras are located at the front and rear of the house. These cameras record both audio and video for the safety and security of all guests and the property.

💰 Damage Deposit

We may request a refundable rules and damage deposit prior to your arrival. This is typically communicated before we accept your reservation so you can decide whether to proceed. This deposit will be fully refunded after checkout as long as there are no damages or rule violations.

📦 Mail & Packages

Please do NOT send mail or packages to this address. We recommend using a local PO Box, Amazon Locker, or arranging Hold for Pickup at UPS/FedEx locations.

🔊 Noise Monitoring

A Minut noise level monitor is located in the common area. This device does NOT record audio or video—it only monitors decibel levels to ensure guests are respecting quiet hours and neighbors.

Questions about any of these details? Feel free to ask before booking!

Guest access

description:
1,500 Sq Ft | Quiet Neighborhood Near Light Rail | 9 Mi to Dtwn

Make this 3-bed, 2.5-bath vacation rental house your home base for your next trip to Charlotte! Enjoy outdoor dining on the private deck after visiting loved ones at UNCC or exploring the city. You'll find tons of attractions nearby, including shopping malls, the NASCAR Hall of Fame, the NODA District, and the PNC Music Pavillion. Plan a trip to Landsford Canal State Park for scenic walks and kayaking along the Catawba River!

listing_name: Tiny Living in Wilmore/South End
description:
Experience stylish tiny living in our 2BR/1BA designer house in Charlotte's vibrant Wilmore/South End! Comfortably sleeps 4, with one on the couch if needed. This 520 sq ft home features a full kitchen, cozy living area, and a private, fenced-in yard. Perfect for a unique city retreat close to Uptown, stadiums, and top restaurants. A quiet oasis in the heart of the action!

The space
Here is your chance to experience stylish tiny living without giving up the comforts of home! Relax in this charming 520 sq ft designer tiny house, thoughtfully laid out with two bedrooms and one full bath. The home is loaded with all the amenities you need for a comfortable and memorable stay.

Inside, you'll find:
Living Area: A cozy living space featuring a comfortable sectional sofa and a wall-mounted TV.
Kitchen & Dining: A sleek, contemporary kitchen with stainless steel appliances and an adjacent dining set for four.
Bedrooms: Two private bedrooms, both appointed with comfortable queen beds.
Bathroom: One modern full bathroom featuring a tiled walk-in shower.
Laundry: An in-unit washer and dryer are available for your convenience.
Outdoor Space: The entire property is nestled within a private, fully fenced-in yard, offering you a quiet retreat in the heart of the city.

Guest access
You will have private and exclusive access to the entire tiny house and the fully fenced-in yard. Enjoy the whole space to yourselves during your stay.

Other things to note
We are excited to host you in our unique tiny house! Please review the house rules prior to booking, and feel free to reach out with any questions. We want to ensure you have a five-star experience in Charlotte.

listing_name: Walk to Uptown from a Contemporary Bungalow
description:
Step into a home where white walls and fixtures are accentuated by the tasteful hardwood floors, metallic trimmings, and wooden textures. Sit out on the porch to watch passersby, sip a drink from the balcony off of the primary bedroom or spend a sunny afternoon lounging in the backyard. The home is set up for both short and long stays. Enjoy privacy and comfort moments from the city.

The space
The house is pet and kid friendly: there are plastic cups, plates, bowls and flatware for your little ones with two legs and a bed, treats, bowls and a fenced-back yard for your little ones with four legs. Baby gates attach to the stairs and other safety items are available. There is a park with a playground at the end of the street, which also provides access to the greenway so that you can walk into Uptown to Bank of America stadium and to Panthers games and concerts.

The house is also adult-friendly: there is plenty of space for relaxing and hanging out. And, if you need a drink, walk around the corner to Blue Blaze Brewery.

The house is within walking distance to the west side of Uptown. Coming in for an event or festival? Need a ride organized? Reach out to the host and she will coordinate for you.

The home is in a peaceful, quiet location close to a range of excellent options. Go to the park for a nice stroll and a picnic, try a flight of local beers at Blue Blaze Brewery, and head uptown to dine at independent restaurants, just minutes away.

The upstairs bedroom is fitted with a king bed. The downstairs bedroom is fitted with a double bed. The office has an available pull out double sofa bed. And if you need one more space, someone can comfortably sleep on the couch in the living room.

Guest access
The house is one mile from Uptown, 15 minutes from the airport and super close to just about everything. There is a driveway that can fit three cars and plenty of on-street parking. Please note that the street is one-way, which means less traffic, but needing to be careful around parked cars.

You will have full and private access to the entire house. There are yard and maintenance staff who will show up on as needed basis.

Access to the house will be given with a code provided just before you check-in.

Other things to note
The house is set up for short-term and longer-term guests. There is an office for those needing space to work and a full-size washer and dryer if you need to wash your clothes.

The office has a double pull out bed. The sheets and pillows for the pull out bed are in the closet in that room.

listing_name: Studio in Myers Park-private entrance
description:
Things you won’t have to worry about here! Loud, inconsiderate neighbors, parking, long commutes to central Charlotte, feeling unsafe where you are, wondering through your host’s yard to find the entrance.

The space
Welcome to our studio! This property is detached garage studio with private entrance in Myers Park area. Convenient to Uptown and South Park. In quiet, safe neighborhood with ample parking. Energetic family lives in main house so you may hear laughter/sibling squabbles/basketball dribbling but other than that, we are very laid back.

The studio includes apartment size fridge, stove top, microwave, toaster, air fryer, tv, queen bed, dining table with 4 chairs, a desk and chair, two lounge chairs, apartment sized sofa and internet service with YouTube TV. You can use your own streaming services.

Please note: there is no oven and no washer/dryer. There are stairs to enter the studio so this property is not ideal for those with mobility issues.

Guest access
You will receive a code from Ashley 1-2 days ahead of your stay for the electronic key entry.

Other things to note
Guests under 25 years of age are considered on a case by case basis. There are some very responsible people under 25 but you must abide by all house rules. We live directly beside the studio so can see and hear anything out of the ordinary. We live in a quiet neighborhood that isn’t tolerant of loud music, parties, etc.

Ample free parking! You will have your choice of two spaces in the back driveway. If you can avoid parking under the basketball goal as my boys like to play basketball in the afternoons. For anyone who needs to sleep during the day, just let us know and we’ll make sure they aren’t playing during your sleep time.

Pets: We do not allow pets. If you have rented from us before you may recall we did allow pets but there were several instances of having to clean hair for hours after pets left. We love pets but unfortunately, do not allow them any longer.

Smoking and vaping of any kind is not cool! It really puts us in a bind when you smoke or vape because it affects our next guest’s stay. Plus we’ve had stuff get destroyed from vapes. It’s also not cool if you smoke and bring the smell into the studio. If we suspect smoking or vaping, we will contact AirBnB and note it in messages to other hosts.

We do our absolute best to have a neutral smelling studio. We do not use perfumes or air fresheners unless necessary. But we do have frequent guests and they may spray perfume or cologne. We run an air purifier full time but if you are especially sensitive to smells, use caution when booking.

listing_name: Charming Home - Walk to Uptown & Panthers Stadium
description:
** Located in a residential neighborhood **
** No parties or events permitted **
** No loud outdoor activity after 9 PM **

Stay in a beautifully remodeled home in Wesley Heights, one of Charlotte’s most charming historic neighborhoods. Walk to Uptown in about 10 minutes and reach Bank of America Stadium in just 8 minutes. Parks, restaurants, and breweries are all nearby, making this a perfect home base for exploring the city.

The space
THE HOME:
This charming historic home blends classic character with modern updates in one of Charlotte’s most desirable neighborhoods. The home features:
• 3 bedrooms with 4 queen beds
• 2.5 bathrooms
• Large primary suite with soaking tub and walk-in shower
• Fully remodeled kitchen and bathrooms
• High ceilings and abundant natural light

The home comfortably accommodates up to 8 guests. Outside, you'll find a lovely front porch, a classic Southern feature perfect for morning coffee, evening drinks, or simply relaxing and enjoying the tree-lined neighborhood. For larger groups, there is also a separate private in-law suite on the property with its own entrance and backyard. It can be rented together with the main house if additional space is needed (see my other listings).

THE NIEGHBORHOOD:
Located in Wesley Heights, one of Charlotte’s historic neighborhoods, the home offers a rare combination of walkability and quiet residential charm. You can easily walk to:
• Uptown Charlotte – about 10 minutes
• Bank of America Stadium – about 8 minutes
• Third Ward Park – about 3 minutes
• Frazier Park – less than 1 minute

Restaurants, breweries, and nightlife are also just a short walk away.

GETTING AROUND:
This location makes getting around Charlotte very easy.
• Walk to Uptown, stadiums, and parks
• Short Uber ride to South End, NoDa, and Plaza Midwood
• Easy access to major highways

Scooters, bikes, and rideshare services are widely available in the area.

Guest access
You'll have access to the entire home. There is also a fully-detached and fully private in-law suite downstairs (it has a separate entrance with it's own backyard and privacy fencing) that can be rented at the same time to accommodate even larger groups - please view my other listings to check availability if interested. There is a driveway (one car) and plenty of free street parking in front of the home if needed.

Other things to note
• This home is located in a quiet residential neighborhood, so parties and events are not allowed.
• Quiet hours begin at 9 PM to respect neighbors.
• Check-in is 4:00 PM and check-out is 11:00 AM.
• The property includes a separate private in-law suite on the lower level with its own entrance and backyard. It may be occupied if not reserved with the main house.
• Free street parking is available, plus a driveway space.
• We love dogs, but this is a pet-free home.

listing_name: Romantic Bright Industrial Revolution
description:
Welcome to this brand new, beautiful, highly upgraded home. Professionally interior designed. Light and bright. Granite countertops. A large island with quartzite countertop and steel I-beam legs. Big living area. Gazebo to entertain and relax.

The space
We are perfecting and constantly improving on this house and enclosed yard. However, I have 12 five-star Airbnb units and this one might be the nicest of them all. Great location. Big and roomy. Three bedrooms (do you nap) plus an amazing pergola in backyard with a Weber grill.

Spectacularly finished and furnished. The pictures are only a placeholder as we finish out this place properly. Many improvements lately.


Such a bright and new house. Amazing kitchen and island to host the whole family especially for special occasions.
Bright, beautifully designed. The fun theme of this house is called “Industrial Revolution.” And its also romantic. Where we embrace the past with details and that are a reflection of success with well-made and creative furnishings. Spacious and open living room, family room, kitchen, and massive island. This kitchen is not only for a chef but supplied with whatever needs to make any wonderful, spectacular, adventurous meals. Quality in the kitchen. Stainless steel fridge, oven and dishwasher. A full laundry nook on the 2nd level.
Front and back porches. Smart TVs in every bedroom. Internet and wifi included.
This is walking distance to the Light rail train station if you want to visit or work downtown. The station is only a couple blocks away. or drive in 3 minutes (only because of lights.) park for free and commute downtown for pleasure or work.
All the towels and linens are top quality, 100% cotton.
Primary bedroom is a huge luxury suite, with tray ceilings, California King bed (Serta spring mattress and boxspring), with a upgraded bathroom with dual vanity and walk-in, rain shower. The guest bedrooms share a dual vanity bathroom with shower/tub combo. Middle bedroom (white) has a queen spring mattress and front bedroom (blue) has a queen Helix Midnight Luxe Plus for heavier couples.

Guest access
This is a 1850 square-foot house with three bedrooms, 2 1/2 baths. With an additional 14' x 14’ pergola and living area outside. The master bedroom is spectacular with the tray ceiling, ceiling fan and a master bathroom that is huge and beautiful, with tile floors and warm tile walls. The master bath shower also has a rain shower head.
The other two bedrooms upstairs share a modern Jack and Jill bathroom. With a spectacular vanity. The kitchen has brand new stainless steel appliances and lighted cabinets. The whole house has wood floors, with a little bit of tile in the bathrooms.

Other things to note
From this house, you can take a 3 1/2 block walk to the train station and grab a commuter train to downtown only about 12 minutes away. If you drive to teh station it will take 2-4 minutes, only because you may hit a light, with free parking. Maybe your lazy and dont want to walk.. lol It’s only a two dollar ride on the light rail with discounts for students . even a monthly pass. Whole group of people can go downtown for less than the cost of parking or an Uber ride. The house is beautiful with hardwood floors. It’s close to Charlotte’s most desirable and entertaining areas. Party Policy: To ensure a great experience for everyone, parties are not allowed. Violations of house rules such as excessive noise, smoking, or additional unapproved guests will result in a $300 fee, reservation cancellation, and removal from the property.

If that works for you, please send an inquiry or instant book — we’d love to host you!

Booking Requirement: Guests must have at least 3 reviews on their profile.

The space
The Trifecta on 7th Street is a charming two-floor, 1 bedroom, 1 bath rental in the 1st Ward District of Uptown Charlotte that includes a fully stocked kitchen, comfortably furnished rooms, and free enclosed private parking. It's within walking distance to the convention center and Uptown Charlotte's best restaurants, pubs, and entertainment.

Our townhome is Charlotte-inspired and it shows in our decor. Everything you see on the wall is somewhere you can go. We love to give recommendations to our guests so never hesitate to ask us for things to do, places to eat, or sights to see.

What you'll really like about staying at our space:

• Cleanliness. Our space is professionally cleaned before each and every reservation, while many other listings in the city are not. You'll really appreciate staying at a clean and well taken care of space.

• Communication. We have a 100% response rate for a reason. We respond to each and every guest message within just a few minutes, before and during your stay.

• Arrival. We have a convenient 24/7 self-check-in system with free enclosed parking that lets our guests have flexible check-in times, no matter how late it is at night.

• Safety. Our townhome is located in an apartment community that has security cameras, is well-lit, and has an enclosed garage for private parking. We also have an outside camera above the street entrance and hallway entrance doors that we use to help us conveniently check-in guests, and as an added security benefit for our guests. These cameras do have audio recording that we are able to review history of if needed. There are no cameras or audio recording devices inside.

• Location. The location we're in is a walker's paradise since most places you'll want to visit won't require a car. 7th Street is as flat as a pancake, has ample sidewalk space, and is very bikeable. Our townhome is just a 10-minute walk away from the Epicentre. Walk Score is 83, Transit Score 81 and Bike Score 68.

Everything you need to know about our townhome:

On the 1st floor, we have a:
• dining table
• fully stocked kitchen with the essential cookware, silverware, and dinnerware you'll need to dine-in
• spacious living room that includes a queen-sized pull out sofa
• Apple TV (must use your own personal subscription for apps)
• super fast wifi, perfect for apple tv streaming
• laptop friendly workspace with lap cushion
• black-out curtains over the large windows

On the 2nd floor, we have a:
• spacious bedroom with a queen-sized bed and lounge chair
• Apple TV (must use your own personal subscription for apps)
• super fast wifi, perfect for apple tv streaming
• full bathroom with standing shower
• walk-in closet that'll hold all your suitcases, travel bags, and clothing
• washer/dryer
• black-out curtains over the large windows

Please take a look at the photos in the listing to see our townhome and feel free to message us with any questions you may have regarding our rental. We typically respond in a few minutes.
