listing_name: Dove's Palette
description:
Cozy studio apartment above detached garage, located 1.2 miles from the heart of Plaza Midwood. Close to the city center, parks, and public transport. Full kitchen and washer/dryer inside unit. There is a work station, Wi-Fi and access to Netflix, Amazon Prime TV and Hulu.

We have a Bluetooth speaker available to play your favorite tunes while enjoying the view of the beautiful trees out of the French doors leading to the second story back deck.

The space
Open setting with a king sized bed – great for couples, business travelers or random adventurers. Close to uptown and central to all of Charlotte. Easy access to the Sugar Creek Greenway.

If you plan to use the single bed, please let us know in advance as we will need to deliver it to the apartment. Please note, there is a one-time $25 setup fee for use of the single bed.

Amenities Include:
• Coffee maker and tea kettle (coffee and tea provided)
• Fully stocked kitchen
• Plenty of towels
• Hairdryer
• Iron with ironing board
• Basic toiletries
• Washer/Dryer with detergent and dryer sheets
• Dishwasher with detergent
• Bluetooth speaker
• High speed internet
• Access to Netflix, Hulu and Amazon Prime
• Local to-go menu library

Nearby Attractions:
• Less than a mile to an award winning brewery, Resident Culture (our personal favorite!)
• 1.2 miles to Plaza Midwood’s commercial area that includes:
o Multiple Restaurants spanning many cuisines and price ranges
o Multiple Bars and Live Music Venues
o More breweries
o Harris Teeter grocery store
o CVS Pharmacy
o Midwood Guitar (BEST boutique guitar shop between DC and Atlanta!)
o Multiple Yoga Studios
o Charlotte Mecklenburg Public Library
o CATS Bus Stop

• 3.2 miles to the Spectrum Center
• 3.6 miles to Bank of America Stadium
• 3.9 miles to BB&T Ballpark
• Less than 15 minute drive to:
o AvidXchange Music Factory (bars, restaurants and live music venues such as The Fillmore and The Charlotte Metro Credit Union Amphitheater)
o NoDa area (breweries, restaurants and live music venues such as Neighborhood Theater and The Evening Muse)
o Metropolitan (shopping center with Trader Joes, Target, and many others)
o Southend area (more breweries and restaurants)

Guest access
You'll have private access to the upstairs studio apartment. We have a smart keypad for the lock, so, you can enter as soon as you arrive. Ample street parking available. Full use of all the relaxation areas in the back yard.

Other things to note
We certainly love all of our furry friends but due to guest allergies they are not allowed on property so that everyone who visits can enjoy their stay!

If you plan to use the single bed, please let us know in advance as we will need to deliver it to the apartment prior to your arrival. Please note, there is a one-time $25 setup fee for use of the single bed.

Our kiddos may be seen running around in the backyard or jumping on the trampoline. You may see us walking our dog, Snoop.

CLEANING PROTOCOL:
We follow Airbnb’s enhanced cleaning protocol, which was developed with expert guidance. Here are a few highlights:

We sanitize high-touch surfaces, down to the doorknob
We use cleaners and disinfectants approved by global health agencies, and wear protective gear to help prevent cross-contamination
We clean each room using extensive cleaning checklists
We provide extra cleaning supplies, so you can clean as you stay
We comply with local laws, including any additional safety or cleaning guidelines

listing_name: Chic Modern Bamboo Bungalow
description:
From the moment you navigate the short curved gravel drive into the heart of this little forest up to the soaring covered deck (the full length of the house), you are captured by the desire to just kick back in the Adirondack chairs or take in the view of the treetops from the hammock in the rear.
Cleverly placed in a bamboo and hardwood grove set far off the street behind the streetfront houses, you will find this home a quiet respite from the city life, but still just 5 minutes from downtown.

The space
Even though it has \bungalow\" in the name
listing_type: it still provides everything a larger home includes - 2 quaint but gorgeous bedrooms with glorious high ceilings and beams. A full bathroom (also with the elevated ceilings) features a wonderful walk-in shower supplied with an endless source of hot water through the tankless water heater system. A full kitchen
cover_photo_url:
and dining area with a beautiful wall of windows to the outside woods. This bungalow even has a full laundry room for your use.

Guest access
The whole house is personally yours for your entire stay. The yard and immediate woods around the house are yours exclusively also
photos_count:
but please be considerate of wandering off into a neighbor's properties fronting the main road.

Other things to note
You may think of 640 sq ft as a tiny home
photo_urls: but with twice the depth of a typical tiny house and with the tall sloped ceilings
host_id:
the modernist contemporary design has a much grander open and comfortable feeling.
Is it a treehouse? Maybe? The house is built on posts up off the ground (no foundation)
host_name:
but is more aptly described as a \"house in the trees\".
It's architectural design and layout result in a very creative gorgeous space; all the while perfectly situated to provide a wonderful private location in the middle of the city."

listing_name: Central Location in South End with Fitness Center
description:
Modern 1-bedroom apartment in the heart of South End! Steps from the Light Rail with direct access to Uptown, stadiums, and museums.

Building features gym, pool, and covered gated parking. Walk to dozens of breweries, restaurants, and Rail Trail.

Perfect for professionals, couples, or anyone wanting to experience Charlotte's trendiest neighborhood. Business travelers love the easy commute to convention center and corporate offices.

Message us to book your South End stay!

The space
Welcome to your modern South End retreat! This stylish 1-bedroom apartment puts you in the center of Charlotte's most walkable and vibrant neighborhood.

🏢 The Apartment

Bedroom

King Bed with quality linens
Closet space for your belongings
Window with natural light

Living Area

Comfortable seating for relaxing after exploring the city
Smart TV for streaming your favorite shows
Open floor plan connecting to kitchen

Kitchen

Full-size appliances including refrigerator, stove, oven, and microwave
Cookware, dishes, and utensils for meal preparation
Coffee maker for your morning routine
Dishwasher for easy cleanup

Bathroom

Full bathroom with tub/shower combination
Fresh towels and basic toiletries provided

Additional Features

In-unit washer and dryer
High-speed WiFi throughout
Climate control heating and cooling
Work-friendly desk/table space

🏙️ Building Amenities

Covered Gated Parking
One parking space included in secure, covered garage. No worrying about street parking or weather!

Fitness Center
Well-equipped gym available 24/7 for residents. Maintain your workout routine without needing a guest pass.

Pool
Relax by the pool during warmer months—a perfect way to unwind after sightseeing or meetings.

Secure Building Access
Gated entry and secure building access for your peace of mind.

📍 The South End Location

You're staying in Charlotte's hottest neighborhood, and everything is within walking distance:
Rail Trail

The Little Sugar Creek Greenway runs right through South End—perfect for morning jogs, bike rides, or evening strolls.

Light Rail Access

The Blue Line Light Rail is steps away, providing easy access to:

Uptown Charlotte (5 minutes)
Charlotte Convention Center (12 minute walk or quick rail ride)
Bank of America Stadium (12 minute walk)
Spectrum Center (10 minute rail ride)
Major corporate offices (most within 15 minute walk)

Dining & Nightlife
South End is known for its incredible food and drink scene:

20+ breweries within walking distance
Dozens of restaurants from casual to upscale
Coffee shops and cafes on every corner
Art galleries and boutique shops

Perfect For
Business Travelers
Easy access to convention center, corporate offices, and stadiums.
Work-friendly space and reliable WiFi.

Couples & Solo Travelers
Experience Charlotte like a local in the city's trendiest neighborhood. Walk to everything without needing a car.

Active Lifestyles
Building gym, nearby Rail Trail, and walkable neighborhood make it easy to stay active.
Anyone Who Loves Urban Living

If you enjoy walkable neighborhoods with great food, drinks, and culture, South End is your spot!

Guest access
You'll have exclusive access to the entire apartment during your stay, plus full access to all building amenities.

Your Access Includes:

- The entire 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment
- One covered parking space in the secure gated garage
- Building fitness center (24/7 access)
- Pool area (open seasonally)
- Common areas and building facilities

The apartment is completely yours to enjoy.

Relax and make yourself at home!

Other things to note
⏰ Check-In/Check-Out Times

We may be able to early check-in requests for an additional fee and advance notice. Standard times will be provided in your check-in instructions.

🧺 Laundry & Linens

You may find clean sheets or towels in the dryer when you arrive—this is completely normal! We often leave them there between turnovers since we don't have time to wait for everything to dry. Feel free to use them or move them aside as needed.

📺 Entertainment

The apartment does not include cable TV. However, we provide a Roku device with access to free channels (Pluto TV, Tubi, Crackle) and you can log into your own streaming accounts (Netflix, Hulu, YouTube TV, Sling TV, etc.).

🔧 Building Maintenance

The building is managed by a professional management company that performs routine maintenance checks from time to time. We'll do our best to give you advance notice, and maintenance will always knock before entering the apartment.

📦 Mail & Packages

Please do NOT send mail or packages to this address. We recommend using a local PO Box, Amazon Locker, or arranging Hold for Pickup at UPS/FedEx locations.

🔊 Noise Monitoring & Neighborhood Character

A Minut noise level monitor is located in the common area. This device does NOT record audio or video—it only monitors decibel levels to ensure guests are respecting quiet hours and neighbors.

Important: South End is one of Charlotte's busiest and most vibrant neighborhoods. You'll hear street noise, nightlife activity, and general urban sounds, especially on weekends. If you're sensitive to noise, this may not be the right location for you. The energy and activity are part of South End's appeal!

🚗 Parking

One covered parking space in the secure gated garage is included. Additional parking is available across the street if you need space for a second vehicle.

Questions about any of these details? Feel free to ask before booking!

description:
This beautifully preserved 1920s bungalow offers 2 bedrooms and 1 bath in one of Charlotte’s most beloved historic neighborhoods. Short and mid-term stays welcome! Relax on the large front porch, then explore Freedom Park and Little Sugar Creek Greenway. Steps from Presbyterian Medical Center and CPCC. Minutes from the new Pearl medical district. Midtown Metropolitan and Kings Drive Farmers Market are blocks away. Airport 8 miles. Plenty of onsite parking.

The home offers a spacious living and dining room, 2 bedrooms with queen beds and a queen sofa bed. The space is beautifully decorated, the kitchen is fully equipped with essentials and niceties, and there is a full-size washer and dryer. Large front porch is the perfect place to savor your morning coffee. Designated driveway parking and plentiful free parking on the street.

Guest access
The whole house is available for rent.

Other things to note
This rental is located in a residential area close to city center. I welcome business travelers, families and couples gateaway. Abosulutely no parties/ extra guest.. i reserve the right to cancel the reservation if the rules are not followed.

listing_name: Soaring Ceilings & City Lights, Loft, 30+ Nights
description:
If you're arriving in Charlotte for a 13-week assignment, a corporate relocation, or extended project, take a breath — you picked a great landing spot. Welcome to Uptown Charlotte's premier furnished loft for corporate & medical professionals, traveling nurses, and staff. This modern 1BR on the 5th floor hosts — sweeping city views from the private balcony, 1 dedicated covered parking space included. 30-night minimum. For professionals who seek to arrive, unpack once, and focus on what matters.

The space
Whether you're starting a new contract at Carolinas Medical Center, settling into a corporate role in Uptown, or working remotely from a city that actually feels like home — this is the space you've been scrolling for.

This modern loft sits in Charlotte's Fourth Ward, the quiet, tree-lined side of Uptown where historic Victorians meet sleek urban living. Step inside and you'll find an open-concept layout with clean lines, warm lighting, and the kind of thoughtful finishes that make a month-long stay feel less like temporary housing and more like your own place.

The living area is built for the end of a long day. Settle into the furnished seating, turn on the flat-screen smart TV, and let a quiet evening take over. Large windows fill the space with natural light during the day, and at night the Charlotte skyline does the rest. Step out onto your private balcony whenever you need fresh air and city views — the kind of small luxury that makes a real difference when you're here for more than a weekend.

The kitchen is full-sized — not a kitchenette, not a microwave on a counter. You'll have a refrigerator, stove, oven, microwave, coffeemaker, and everything you need to actually cook: pots, pans, dishes, utensils, all of it. Whether you're meal-prepping for the week or just making coffee before an early shift, it's all here and ready.

Your dedicated workspace is set up for real work — a proper desk and chair in a space that's separate from the bedroom. High-speed WiFi is reliable throughout the unit, strong enough for video calls, remote sessions, and whatever your workday throws at you.

The bedroom is your retreat. A queen bed with premium linens and blackout curtains so you can sleep on your schedule, not the sun's. There's real closet space and storage so you can unpack and settle in — no living out of a suitcase for 13 weeks. The full bathroom is clean, modern, and entirely private.

You'll also have your own in-unit washer and dryer. Not a shared laundry room down the hall. Not a trip across the building. It's private, in your unit, on your time — because after a 12-hour shift, the last thing you need is one more errand.

One more thing most Uptown listings can't offer: a dedicated, covered parking space in the building's attached garage, included at no extra cost. Covered parking in Uptown Charlotte runs $150 to $250 a month. Here, it's yours from day one.

The building has secure keycard entry and an elevator, and the CityLYNX Gold Line streetcar Charlotte Area Transit System stops right outside — fare-free and connecting you across Charlotte without a car.

This loft was set up for people who need a real home during a professional chapter — not a hotel room, not a crash pad. Whether your stay is 30 days or six months, you'll have everything you need to live comfortably, work effectively, and actually enjoy your time in Charlotte.

Your daily essentials are closer than you'd expect.
* Harris Teeter is a five-minute walk on West 6th Street your go-to for full grocery runs.
* Reid's Fine Foods is eight minutes on foot for grab-and-go lunches and a surprisingly good wine selection. * Need coffee first? Indigo Coffee & Tea in Fourth Ward is a six-minute stroll with two floors of workspace and locally roasted espresso.
* There's even a pizza spot and a Greek-American grill right at street level in the building — Bisonte Pizza Co. and Little Village Grill — for those nights when cooking just isn't happening.

Healthcare professionals, your commute is short.
*Atrium Health Carolinas Medical Center, the region's only Level I trauma center, is just 1.8 miles south — roughly a 6-minute drive, even during shift change.
*Novant Health Presbyterian Medical Center County Office is about 2 miles east, a straight 8-minute drive. Whether you're on days, nights, or rotating, you're home fast.

And the Gateway Village YMCA is literally steps from your door — a two-minute walk — so fitting in a workout between shifts actually happens here.

Corporate travelers, leave the car keys on the counter.
* Bank of America's headquarters is a 10-minute walk east on Trade Street.
* Truist, Duke Energy, Ally Financial, Wells Fargo, and Honeywell & WBTV are all within a 10-to-12-minute walk along the Tryon Street corridor.
* The fare-free CityLYNX Gold Line streetcar stops right outside — the Gateway Station is a one-minute walk — connecting you across Uptown without ever starting the engine. The LYNX Blue Line light rail is a short streetcar ride away for trips to South End, NoDa, and UNC Charlotte.

When you're off the clock, this neighborhood delivers.
* Fourth Ward Park is a three-minute walk with shaded paths and fountains.
* Frazier Park — a 16-acre green space with a dedicated dog park, basketball courts, and greenway trails is six minutes on foot.
* Romare Bearden Park, Ballantyne Charlotte's crown jewel with its waterfalls and garden terraces, is a 10-minute walk and sits right next to Truist Field for summer Knights baseball.
* Catch Panthers games and Charlotte FC matches at Bank of America Stadium, eight minutes away on foot.
* Blumenthal Performing Arts and the Spectrum Center are both within a 12-minute walk for Broadway shows, Hornets games, and concerts.
* Charlotte Douglas International Airport is 15 minutes by car.

Fourth Ward has a genuine neighborhood feel — historic Victorian homes, quiet streets, friendly dog-walkers, a real sense of community — all inside one of the most walkable urban cores in the Southeast.

You'll have everything you need within reach, and the kind of neighborhood where you actually feel settled — not just housed. This is a place that makes a new city feel like home.

* Urban chic interiors
* Exposed brick and duct work
* Floor to ceiling windows
* Free and secure garage parking
* 1 BR / 1 BA, 820+sf
* 1 parking space
* Secured entry / security cameras and guards
* Stainless steel GE Profile appliances
* Motorized shades upstairs
* Washer/dryer in unit
* Smart TVs with limited
cable channels
* GoldLYNX Streetcar access

Guest access
You will have private, exclusive access to the entire unit — Unit 507 is yours for the duration of your stay. Building entry is via secure keycard access. Your stay includes one dedicated covered parking space in the attached garage — no hunting for street parking, no daily garage fees. Parking access details and your assigned space number are provided with your check-in instructions. Our co-host management team is available 7 days a week.

Other things to note
IMPORTANT — PLEASE READ BEFORE BOOKING: 30-night minimum stay required — monthly rental only. A signed month-to-month lease agreement is required within 24 hours of booking — sent via DocuSign. listing_name: Tiny Home by NoDA-Uptown-Cordelia Park
description:
🏡 Charming 1-bedroom tiny home in Villa Heights' Mill District!

Perfect for couples or solo travelers seeking a stylish, private retreat. Features kitchenette, full bath, washer/dryer, and private entrance.

Steps from Sugar Creek Greenway Trail and Cordelia Park. Minutes to NoDa's breweries, Plaza Midwood's restaurants, and Uptown Charlotte.

🐶 Pet-friendly! Experience Charlotte's hottest neighborhood from your own cozy space.

Message us to book your Mill District adventure!

The space
Welcome to your private Villa Heights retreat! This charming 1-bedroom tiny home offers all the comforts you need in one of Charlotte's most vibrant and walkable neighborhoods.

🏠 The Space

Your cozy tiny home features:

- Private entrance - your own space, complete privacy
- Queen bed with quality linens for a restful night's sleep
- Kitchenette equipped with essentials (mini fridge, microwave, coffee maker, basic cookware)
- Full bathroom with shower
- In-unit washer and dryer - pack light!
- High-speed WiFi for streaming and remote work
- Climate control for year-round comfort
- Smart TV for entertainment
- Contactless self-check-in
- Pet-friendly - bring your furry friend! 🐶

📍 Location - The Heart of the Mill District

You're perfectly positioned in Villa Heights, Charlotte's trending neighborhood where historic charm meets modern cool:

Cordelia Park - 5 minute walk. Green space, playground, and community gathering spot

Sugar Creek Greenway Trail - Right at your doorstep! Perfect for morning runs, bike rides, or evening strolls

NoDa (North Davidson) - 5 minutes away. Charlotte's arts district with breweries, galleries, and live music venues

Plaza Midwood - 5 minutes away. Eclectic restaurants, coffee shops, vintage stores, and nightlife

Uptown Charlotte - 10 minutes away. Downtown attractions, sports venues, and business district

The Mill District - You're in it! A revitalized neighborhood with industrial charm, local eateries, and creative energy

Walk Score Paradise

Everything you need is within walking or biking distance:
- Coffee shops and breakfast spots
- Local breweries and bars
- Restaurants ranging from casual to upscale
- Grocery stores and convenience shops
- Parks and outdoor recreation

Perfect For

- Couples seeking a romantic getaway
- Solo travelers who want their own space
- Remote workers needing a change of scenery
- Pet owners exploring Charlotte with their pup
- Anyone who loves walkable, authentic neighborhoods over touristy areas

Experience Charlotte like a local from your own private tiny home in one of the city's most exciting neighborhoods!

Guest access
You'll have access to everything at the Tiny House as well as the yard. Make yourself at home.

Other things to note
🏡 Shared Yard Space

The tiny home sits on the same property as our main house, which is also rented on Airbnb. Both properties share the yard space. You may encounter other guests coming and going, so please be courteous and respectful of shared outdoor areas.

🐾 Important Pet Information

Since both properties are pet-friendly, there may be other dogs on the property during your stay. Please keep these guidelines in mind:

- Always monitor your pet when other guests are arriving or departing
- Keep your dog on leash in the shared yard areas or maintain close control if off-leash
- Be mindful that other guests may have pets or may be uncomfortable around dogs
- Do NOT allow your dog to rush or approach other guests without permission

Pet Waste Policy: Please clean up after your pet immediately and dispose of waste in the garbage cans in the parking area. Bags should be provided, but please bring extras to be safe. A $20 fee will be charged for any pet waste left on the property.

Nearby Dog-Friendly Options: The Sugar Creek Greenway (5 minute walk) is perfect for leashed walks, and there are several great dog parks within a short drive if you'd like more space for your pup to run freely.

🧺 Laundry & Linens

You may find clean sheets in the dryer when you arrive—this is normal! We often leave them there between guest turnovers. Feel free to move them aside and use the washer/dryer as needed during your stay.

📦 Mail & Packages

Please do NOT send mail or packages to this address. We recommend arranging delivery to a local PO Box, Amazon Locker, or using Hold for Pickup services at UPS/FedEx locations.

📹 Security Cameras

For the safety of all guests, outdoor security cameras are located facing the parking area. These cameras record 24/7 and do not have audio. There are no cameras inside the tiny home or facing private indoor spaces.

Questions about any of these details? Feel free to reach out before booking!

listing_name: 4bR SouthPark Wooded Escape, Shopping and Dining
description:
Enjoy the heart of SouthPark from this 4 BR home with game room, two common areas, and natural fenced in yard.

Nestled between beautiful tree-lined streets blocks from the spectacular retail community of SouthPark. Perfect for groups: open great room, plenty of seating, and game room! Enjoy quick access to all of Charlotte!

Book Now!

The space
This amenity-packed home comfortably accommodates up to 8 guests, in 4 large bedrooms, with 2 additional couches. It's Ideal for large families and big groups, but flexible enough for business travelers and couples.

Remote Workers and Students work simultaneously on our high-speed internet. Work at a desk in your private room, the kitchen table, the great room, or the den.

Tested 2/7/2021: 210 mbps download speed

The main floor offers tons of seating, perfect for entertaining. Prepare a tasty meal in the stainless steel kitchen, completely stocked with: oven, stovetop, microwave, toaster oven, pots & pans, glasses, plates, and utensils. Coffee and tea is included!

Unwind to cable and Netflix from the 50 ” Smart TV, or additionally in two of the bedrooms. Laundry machines, iron, and ironing board also included.

Retire to your own specious bedrooms, featuring fresh pillows, comforters, towels, and linens. Each bedroom is equipped with a ceiling fan, plenty of closet storage space, and mirrors for getting ready.

All bathrooms include plenty of shampoo, conditioner, body wash, and hand soap, Hairdryers are available in each full bath.

The lower level suite features a bonus game room, bedroom, and full bathroom. Play game after game of darts, Giant Jenga, cards, board games, or color on the full-length chalkboard wall.

Make your way outside to the large furnished deck, or down to the hammock and enjoy the private fenced in wooded back yard.

Book now, and get the most out of Charlotte!

Guest access
Guests have private access to all 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, kitchen, both living areas, laundry room, and backyard. The locked owners' closet and shed are unavailable. Ample parking is provided in the driveway and carport.

Self-entry via electronic lock ensures easy access. Early check-in may be requested and accommodated if possible.

Other things to note
**House Rules**
The home is friendly to both pets and small children, pending they are house trained.
Any breach will result in up to a $300 fine for additional cleaning.
Baby (or puppy) gates are available as well as protective outlet covers!

We provide starter supplies, enough for 3-4 day stays. It will be up to the guest to replenish those supplies for extended stays.
Each guest will be provided a rental agreement before the start of your reservation.
Per the NC Vacation Rental Act, signature, payment of money, or taking possession of the property are evidence of your acceptance of the agreement.
The booking guest is required to complete the check-in form with a valid government ID.  Missing or inaccurate information will result in a termination of your stay without refund.
Minimum booking age: 25 years old.
If the booking party is under 25, MyTripify reserves the right to collect a *refundable $1000 security deposit along with an ID of guest who is 25 or above. Alternatively the reservation may be canceled and refunded based on the cancellation policy.

Access to the Home:
Early check-in (1:00 PM) may be requested and will be accommodated if possible.
Cost: $99 + Booking platform fees
You have private access to the entire home except for the locked owners' closet on the lower level and the locked shed in the backyard. Use of the attic fan is prohibited as it may blow out the hot water heater’s pilot light
To keep belongings safe and secure, be sure to lock all doors and windows when leaving the property.
Check-in is at 5:00 PM
Check-out is at 11:00 AM
Holdover or Late Checkout will result in a $250 fee, and does not entitle the guest to any extension of the rental period.

Quiet Hours - Beginning 10 PM:
You have the right to quiet enjoyment of the property during your stay, please do not disturb the rights of the neighbors. Only guests on the booking are allowed on premises.
No parties are permitted. Any neighborhood disturbance will result in a $400 fine and termination of your stay without refund.

Pets:
Approved pets must be confirmed prior to check-in, (3 pets maximum). Pending approval, the exact count needs to be added to the reservation prior to check in. Any undisclosed pets will result in a $350 fine. No cats allowed.
Pet owners must disclose the type of pet, breed, name, and age. If pet stays are longer than 1 week, MyTripify may require guests to purchase travel insurance.
Please keep pets off furniture and beds. Removal of pet hair from furniture will result in additional fees up to $300.
Pet owners are to clean up after all waste in the yard and surrounding area. Any damages done will be charged to the guest.

Parking:
Parking is available in the driveway and carport for up to five cars. Driving or parking on the lawn or grass is prohibited and will incur a $200 fine. Public street parking is not available.
To safely exit the drive way into the street, use the turnaround area of the carport. In order to make a left hand turn during heavy traffic, you may wish to turn right then make your next available left or U turn.

Smoking:
No smoking whatsoever inside the home.
Smoking is permitted outside only. All remnants must be properly disposed of outside to prevent any smell inside. If the house smells of smoke or remnants are found inside, a smoking fee will be issued of $500.

Damages:
Guests are responsible to immediately report and pay for any damages cause during their stay.

Internet Usage:
We are not responsible for material viewed or downloaded by users from the internet including but not limited to illegally copyrighted material such as movies, music, or other digital media. Doing so will result in a fine of $500 per occurrence. Additionally you agree to Indemnify and hold harmless us for any damages caused by illegal internet use.

Trash:
Trash should fit into the outside receptacles or be removed disposed of prior to checkout. Any trash that does not fit into the outside receptacles will incur an additional $75 per bag charge.

description:

$20 per nite inside the garage on our HPWC

No indoors pets are allowed.
We may ask guests to move cars off the grass during mowing season.
Digital channels, Blue-ray/PS3 available. Small movie collection available.
Microwaving your food is fine, cooking is not allowed.

description:
** Located in a residential neighborhood **

Stay in a beautifully restored historic home in Plaza Midwood, one of Charlotte’s most vibrant and walkable neighborhoods. Just minutes from Uptown, the home is a short walk to restaurants, breweries, coffee shops, and nightlife. Enjoy classic Southern charm, modern updates, and a welcoming front porch in the heart of the city.

The space
This spacious historic home combines classic Southern charm with modern comfort.

THE HOME:
The home features:
• 4 bedrooms with comfortable queen beds
• 2 full bathrooms
• Fully renovated kitchen and bathrooms
• High ceilings and tons of natural light
• Beautiful front porch perfect for relaxing

The backyard patio and deck offer a great place to gather with seating and a barbecue grill.

The home comfortably accommodates up to 8 guests. If you need additional space, the property also includes a separate loft apartment with 2 queen beds and a full bathroom that can be added to your reservation (or booked separately through my other listings).

THE NEIGHBORHOOD:
The home is located in the heart of Plaza Midwood, one of Charlotte’s most popular and lively neighborhoods. You can walk to:
• Restaurants and cafés
• Breweries and bars
• Live music and nightlife
• Parks and local shops

It’s less than a mile from Uptown Charlotte, giving you quick access to the city’s business district, sports venues, and entertainment.

GETTING AROUND:
Getting around from this location is very easy.
• Walk to Plaza Midwood restaurants and nightlife
• Less than a mile to Uptown Charlotte
• Quick access to major highways

Many guests choose to walk, Uber, or use scooters and bikes to explore the city.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire home during their stay.

Parking is easy with:

• Large private driveway (4–5 cars)
• Free street parking directly in front of the home

Before arrival, you’ll receive a private 4-digit code for easy self check-in using the keypad on the front door.

Other things to note
To preserve the peaceful neighborhood environment:
Parties and events are not allowed at this property
No loud activity allowed past 9pm

The Room

Welcome!
We strive to provide the best hospitality to make you feel right at home during your stay. Since we live on-site, we’re available to help with anything you need but will mostly give you privacy to enjoy your trip. Feel free to message me anytime on Airbnb.

Your private bedroom is located on the third floor, accessible via two sets of stairs—first to the second-floor landing, then up to the third floor.

The room features soft bedding designed for your comfort, including a Linenspa queen-size memory foam mattress and fresh linens.
For your convenience, we’ve provided a dresser, TV, luggage rack, mini refrigerator, and essential toiletries.

Room Amenities:

*Linenspa queen-size memory foam mattress
*Fresh, high-quality linens
*Air conditioner & heater
*Ceiling fan
*Large closet
*Carpeted floor
*Towels and toiletries (shampoo, soap, toothpaste, hairdryer)
*Extra blankets and sheets

*Laundry available

Please Note:
To keep the new carpet looking its best, we ask that you avoid drinking red wine or coffee in the bedroom unless using a covered cup.

No smoking or vaping is allowed inside the house or bedroom.

*Mail*
We do not mind if you receive the occasional Amazon package at our house, however, you are not allowed to receive or forward any other mail here. We ask that you set up a post office box for your mail.
We recommend the post office next to Trader Joe’s at Piper Glen or the Matthews post office. Both are located within a 10-minute drive of the house.

Guest access
You’re welcome to explore and enjoy the entire house. Consider it your home during your stay.

As a professional cook, I use high-end cookware in the kitchen. You're welcome to prepare meals, but I’ll give you a quick tutorial on using the pots and pans to keep everything in great shape.

We encourage you to relax and unwind—build a fire, sip your favorite beverage, and enjoy the koi pond and garden. Don’t be surprised if we join you for a chat or a laugh!

We’re a little old-fashioned around here and still use real keys—remember those? You’ll receive one when you check in, along with simple instructions for returning it at the end of your stay.

During your stay
Meet Your Hosts

Hi! I’m Kristen. My husband Ning and I are excited to welcome you. We’re both artists in our own ways—Ning is a professional musician who plays with the Charlotte Symphony and I’m a professional cook. Hospitality is important to us, and we do our best to make your stay comfortable, relaxing, and a little special—like a home away from home.

Since we live in the house, we're nearby if you need anything, but we’ll respect your privacy and let you enjoy your stay. Feel free to reach out via Airbnb messaging anytime.

You’re always welcome to join us for a glass of wine, a spontaneous musical performance, or even a gourmet dinner. We'd love to share some joy and good company—if you’re up for it!

Other things to note
House Guidelines

This is a smoke-free property. Both my husband and I are sensitive to smoke and vape products, so we kindly ask that you refrain from smoking or vaping inside the house. You're welcome to smoke in the backyard—please dispose of cigarette butts in the outdoor garbage can. I appreciate your understanding!

For everyone's safety, we have security cameras installed on the exterior perimeters of the property only. There are no cameras inside the house or in any private guest areas.

We do not mind if you occasionally receive an Amazon package at our address. However, you are NOT allowed to receive or forward your MAIL here. We kindly ask that you set up a post office box for your mail. We recommend the post office next to Trader Joe’s at Piper Glen or at the Matthews post office. Both post offices are within a 10-minute drive of the house.

Ning teaches violin lessons from a private office studio on-site. His teaching hours are typically Monday through Friday from 3–7 PM, with occasional Sunday sessions. Students use a separate entrance, and their visits will not interfere with your stay.

listing_name: 4BR+1.5 Miles to Uptown+Steps to CampNorthEnd
description:
Our home is a 2400 sq. ft. three story townhome located the North End of Charlotte. It has 4 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, and 6 beds. There is plenty of space for rest, entertainment, and memories. The exceptionally large kitchen is stocked with all the cooking supplies you might need. Additionally, our bar is just waiting to chill your favorite beverage. To get a feel for how close you are to the city, just take a step out onto the balcony for quick glimpse of some of Charlotte's favorite buildings.

The space
The house has all the amenities for people traveling for work, working from home, a couple, or small family. If you're looking for a place to work, you can enjoy several work surfaces on the main level with plenty of natural light as well as fast internet. If you're looking for a night in, enjoy a game night with a selection of provided games and cards, or sign into your favorite streaming service and cozy up on the couch or watch in private in one of our two master suites. You'll be sure to get your rest while sleeping on one of our memory foam mattresses, but if you need an extra boost in the morning please enjoy a cup or 2 of provided coffee or tea. Our home is family friendly: pack n play, books, changing pad, and toys are available (all items are thoroughly sanitized between stays). We also have a queen self-inflating air mattress available upon request.

Guest access
Before you arrive we will provide you with a keyless entry code for the home. We have a select number of owners closet's that are locked as well as the garage. Other than those spaces, you are welcome to the entire house.

Other things to note
Our cleaning team is taking extra precautions to ensure all areas of our home are sanitized thoroughly between guests. Please know that all high traffic areas, frequent touchpoint surfaces, and all linens are always of high priority to our cleaning team.

We do not allow parties on the property.

listing_name: Sleek Modern Tiny House!
description:
This custom built high-end tiny home brings the owner's vision to life. It's a one-of-a-kind 14 foot ceiling design from a renowned local architect, assembled by a trusted custom builder, and finally, decorated and furnished with custom lighting accents and furnishings hand-selected by the designer.

Please note that once you have booked, you will be contacted by SUPERHOG directly to verify yourself. Please make sure this is completed prior to check-in.

The space
This unique tiny home was designed to capture an abundance of natural sunlight with the 14 foot floor-to-ceiling windows. It's layout, design, and location captures the heightened importance of privacy and solitude prioritized by the owner.

Facing the backyard (out of direct sight from neighboring homes). The house has its own private entrance. All windows and doors are laden with custom remote controlled rolling blinds for additional privacy if needed.

Includes a fully stocked kitchen, full bath, bedroom, and washer and dryer.

Located in the heart of NODA you are just minutes from Uptown Charlotte. This location is surrounded with amazing local restaurants and nightlife.

This tiny house has plenty of space to be comfortable and less burdened by material living. Join the owner in experiencing and embracing a true minimalist lifestyle and unencumbered private living. Located in the heart of NODA you are just minutes from Uptown Charlotte.

Guest access
The guests have access to the whole property besides the Main House in the front. The Tiny House and the Main House are rented out separately and have separate backyards.

Other things to note
Guest access includes:
*Entire House
*Back Yard
*Porch
*Off-street Parking for 2 vehicles
*Master: 1 Queen Bed
*Washer and Dryer
*Smart TVs (no cable) with Netflix + Many More Apps

Please ensure you are booking with your full legal name. We have a strict 10am checkout. If you'd like to pay to check out later, the latest we can do is 1pm, at $30 per hour. Please let us know one day in advance if this is something you'd like to schedule!

listing_name: Modern King Suite · Ground-Floor · Myers Park
description:
Located in the heart of Myers Park, this welcoming condo blends quiet residential charm with effortless city access. Stroll along the tree-lined Myers Park Mile or reach Freedom Park’s greenway in minutes. Uptown is just a short drive away, making trips to the stadium and corporate offices easy. With free parking and a plush king bed, the home is ideal for professionals, couples, and guests visiting Atrium CMC or Novant who value comfort and convenience.

The space
Step into a bright, ground-floor home designed for easy, comfortable living. The open layout creates a natural flow between the living area and kitchen, making the space feel relaxed and welcoming from the start. The home also features accessibility-focused details, including grab bars in the shower and a dedicated handicap parking space just outside the entrance. The king bedroom offers a calm place to unwind at the end of the day, while the overall atmosphere remains quiet and private. Whether you're in town for work or a weekend away, the space feels simple, warm, and easy to settle into.

❤️ Why Guests Love This Home
• Cozy king bed in the primary bedroom with soft linens for a restful night’s sleep
• Chic, art-filled living room showcasing local artwork by Nico Amortegui for a warm, boutique feel
• Fully equipped kitchen for real cooking with a gas range, countertops, and dining seating for four
• Large TV in bedroom and living room, plus free fast Wi-Fi and Hulu Live TV
• Shared outdoor patio and seating for relaxed lounging
• Walk-in shower with a starter supply kit of quality toiletries provided
• In-unit washer and dryer
• On-site parking available on a first-come, first-served basis in a private lot
• Pet-friendly accommodations
• Quality linens, complimentary snacks, and thoughtful touches throughout
• Fitness-minded guests enjoy convenient access to Charlotte’s Dowd YMCA, just five minutes away (7-day pass available for $50)

Guest access
You’ll enjoy private access to the entire apartment.
🔑 Check-in: 4 PM – 10 PM
(Arriving after 10 PM? Please let us know to ensure a smooth after-hours check-in.)
🏁 Check-out: 10 AM
(Early check-in or late check-out may be available for an additional compensation.)
Secure keyless entry via a unique combination for contact-free check-in.

Other things to note
We want your stay to be as enjoyable and stress-free as possible! Please review the following guidelines carefully before booking.
​
Rental Agreement:
Guests must be 21+ to book (verified for security only)
A rental agreement will be provided before check-in.
As per the NC Vacation Rental Act, payment, signature, and/or taking possession of the property serves as acceptance.
The booking guest must complete the check-in form with a valid government ID. Missing or inaccurate information may result in cancellation without refund.
​
Additional information
Please lock all doors and windows when leaving.
Unauthorized late departures $200 may be collected.
Optional workstation rental available with monitor, keyboard, and mouse.
We provide a starter kit of supplies, any additional supplies needed must be purchased

Quiet Hours
Quiet hours begin at 10 PM.
Please respect neighbors and keep noise to a minimum.
Only registered guests are allowed on the property.
Parties or large gatherings are not permitted. Any violation $300 may be collected and termination of your stay without refund.

Pets
Dogs only (max 2). $59/per pet may be collected
All pets must be registered before arrival. Unregistered pets $120 per pet may be collected.
Pet owners must provide breed.
Pets are not allowed on furniture or bedding. Excessive hair or damage cleaning charges of $250 plus the cost of any damages may be collected.
Guests are responsible for cleaning up pet waste around the property (waste stations are conveniently located around the property).
Any pet that continues to disrupt other guest's and their ability to relax and enjoy their stay may result in a cancellation of your reservation with no refund.

Parking
Free onsite parking available.

Smoking
Absolutely no smoking.
If smoke odor or remnants are found inside, a $500 cleaning charges may be collected.

Damages & Conduct:
Please report any damage immediately. We know accidents happen, and we ask guests to be truthful when they do
Guests are responsible for any excessive damage caused during their stay.
​
Internet Use:
The Internet is provided for general use.
​
Trash:
Trash should fit in the outdoor bins provided.
​
Optional Extras:
Computer, monitor, and mouse available for rent at $10/day.
Family Items: Pack ’n Play or highchair available with 24 hr notice.
Eight private residences share this historic building.
